### Jack Kruse — 2026-01-06T17:22:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-things-magnetic-monopoles.31760/post-364859>

Neutrinos cannot "separate" quarks.

This implies in a way that leaves a quark isolated. This is due to a fundamental property of the universe called **color confinement.

Color Confinement**

Individual quarks can never be isolated in free space. Unlike gravity or electromagnetism, the strong force that holds quarks together (mediated by gluons) does not get weaker as quarks are pulled apart. Instead, the energy required to separate them increases until it is "energetically favorable" to create a brand-new pair of quarks. If you hit a group of quarks with enough energy (using a neutrino or any other particle), you simply end up with **more quarks** (newly created hadrons) rather than a single separate quark.

This implies you can never pull two quarks apart either, no matter how much energy you use, and that rule shapes all matter we know. This Quantum fact explains why atoms hold together so reliably and why the universe has stable building blocks instead of falling apart into chaos instantly everywhere.

Quarks are the tiny pieces inside protons and neutrons. They are bound by a force so strong it behaves differently from anything familiar. When you try to separate them, the connection tightens. Add more energy, and instead of freeing a quark, you create new ones. Separation simply never happens.

This strange behavior is called confinement. It feels counterintuitive because most bonds break when stretched. Quantum physics flips that idea. The force between quarks grows with distance, like an elastic band that stiffens instead of snapping. Nature enforces togetherness at the deepest level.

Because of this rule, quarks are never seen alone. Every experiment confirms it. All visible matter depends on this permanent bond. Stars, planets, bodies, and technology exist because quarks refuse to part ways. Stability comes not from weakness, but from an unbreakable rule written into reality.

There is something quietly poetic here. At the smallest scale, separation is not allowed. Quantum science shows that connection can be fundamental, not optional. The universe is built on relationships that cannot be undone. Understanding this deep glue helps scientists explain matter, energy, and the early universe, while also reminding us that some bonds are stronger than force itself. It turns a simple particle fact into a reflection on structure, resilience, and how the unseen rules keep everything standing together every single day across space and time.

**How Neutrinos Interact with Quarks**

While they cannot isolate quarks, neutrinos **can** interact with them via the **weak force, not the strong force**. When a high-energy neutrino strikes a quark inside a nucleus, several things can happen:

-   **Flavor Change:** A neutrino can change a quark's "flavor" (e.g., turning a down quark into an up quark), which can transform one element into another, such as Chlorine into Argon. This mimics alchemy. It is clear Newton had a hunch that Nature has a process built in to change atoms in some way. I believe the reason Newton never gave up this idea is because is because he could never find how this happened in his lab experiments. Because neutrinos only interact via the weak force and gravity, they rarely hit anything at all. Trillions pass through you every second without a single interaction. That is why Newton remain flummoxed for his entire life.
-   **Momentum Transfer:** A neutrino can "bounce" off a quark, transferring energy and momentum without changing either particle's identity.
-   **Nuclear Disruption:** Extremely high-energy neutrinos (like those detected by the IceCube Neutrino Observatory) can disrupt an entire atomic nucleus by striking a quark with enough force to break the nucleus apart, though the quarks themselves remain bound in new combinations

If you look at a proton you see something unusual. There is a discrepancy in a proton's mass and its energy content. Can that be tapped if confinement is a quantum law of the cosmos?

**Actually, you can** harvest that energy, but only by destroying the proton entirely rather than "separating" its parts. The "discrepancy" one should notice where the total mass of the proton is much higher than the sum of its three valence quarks. This is the key to how much energy is actually available.

The Energy "Discrepancy"

The three valence quarks (two up, one down) only account for about **1%** of a proton’s total mass. The remaining **99%** is not missing; it is **binding energy** and the kinetic energy of gluons and "sea quarks" moving at near-light speeds within the proton.

Because e =2.718 mc2, this intense internal energy manifests externally as the proton's rest mass.
To "harvest" this, you must convert that mass-energy back into a usable form, such as electromagnetic radiation or kinetic energy.

How to Harvest Proton Energy
Because quarks cannot be isolated due to **confinement**, you cannot "unzip" a proton to let the energy leak out. There are only two known ways to access this energy:

-   **Antimatter Annihilation:** When a proton meets an antiproton, they annihilate completely. This converts **100%** of their mass (including the 99% "discrepancy" energy) into pure energy, mostly in the form of gamma rays and pions. This is the most efficient energy release possible in physics.
-   **Nuclear Fusion:** In the Sun, four protons are fused into a Helium nucleus. The resulting Helium atom is slightly lighter than the four individual protons. This tiny difference in mass (the "mass defect") is released as sunlight and heat.
-   **LENR Fusion: In principle, any nuclear reaction—including Low Energy Nuclear Reactions (LENR)—that results in a net release of energy must involve a "mass defect". However, the process by which that mass is converted to energy in LENR is believed to be fundamentally different from the solar fusion process.**

    The Mass defect rule according to e=mc2, if a reaction (chemical or nuclear) releases energy, the total mass of the products must be less than the total mass of the reactants.
-   Solar Fusion: Roughly 0.7% of the protons' mass is converted into energy as they fuse into helium.
-   LENR: If these reactions occur as claimed, they would also result in a mass defect. However, because LENR typically occurs at room temperature without the extreme pressure of a star, scientists believe the _mechanism_ is not standard solar-style fusion.
-   Why LENR is Not "Solar Fusion"
    While the _result_ (energy from mass) is similar, the _pathway_ is thought to differ:
-   **Solar Fusion (Strong Force):** Relies on high temperatures to overcome the "Coulomb barrier" (the repulsion between positive protons) so the **strong nuclear force** can bind them together.
-   **LENR (Electroweak Interaction):** Many modern theories, such as the [Widom-Larsen theory](https://news.newenergytimes.net/), suggest LENR involves **weak nuclear interactions**. Instead of forcing two protons together, it may involve creating ultra-low-energy neutrons that can easily enter a nucleus without needing high temperatures, leading to isotopic changes and energy release without dangerous radiation being emitted. The radiation emitted in some cases maybe critical in biological signaling. (UPE)

**Comparison of Energy Release**

| Feature | Solar/Hot Fusion | LENR (Theoretical) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Primary Force** | Strong Nuclear Force | Electroweak Interaction |
| **Requirements** | Extreme Heat/Pressure | Metal Lattices/Catalysts |
| **Mass Defect** | Yes (High) | Yes |
| **Byproducts** | Gamma rays, high-energy neutrons | Low-energy heat, rare UPE radiation |

While both would "harvest" the energy associated with mass defect, LENR is considered a distinct "third form" of nuclear energy generation that does not follow the same rules as the "hot" fusion found in stars

**Theoretical Future Methods**

-   **Proton Decay:** Some Grand Unified Theories (GUTs) predict that protons are naturally unstable and will eventually decay into lighter particles like positrons and pions over trillions of years. If we could artificially trigger this process, we could theoretically turn any matter into energy without needing antimatter.
-   **Black Hole Evaporation:** A microscopic black hole could "harvest" the energy of any matter fed into it, including protons, by converting their mass into Hawking radiation.

**Summary**

The energy isn't "buried" in a way that makes it inaccessible; it _is_ the mass of the proton itself. We already harvest small portions of it through nuclear fusion, and total harvesting is possible through antimatter annihilation, though we currently lack a natural source of antiprotons to make this a viable power source. Life might have found a different way using LENR physics.

New evidence published early in 2026 in physics has huge implications for my decentralized thesis.

[https://phys.org/news/2026-01-dark-neutrinos-interact-standard-universe.html](https://t.co/X1b7LnKjDW)

Why?

What did the paper say?

The paper suggests that dark matter and neutrinos may interact, challenging the standard cosmological model. This potential interaction could explain discrepancies in how cosmic structures formed, offering new insight into the universe’s evolution and guiding future astronomical and particle physics research. But how does it tie to my thesis?

If dark matter turns out to be a genuine component of the universe, despite the ongoing debates labeling it as a theoretical placeholder or even pseudoscience in some circles, the implications would be transformative across cosmology, particle physics, and our broader understanding of quantum biology.

Why?

Here are just three things that would become axiomatic if this new finding in physics is true......

**1\. Parity Violation Amplification in Biological Chirality:** Dark matter-neutrino interactions should enhance weak-force parity violation (already biasing L-amino acids), providing a mechanism for directional "spins" in TCA cycles (clockwise growth vs. counterclockwise reversal). In my decentralized framework, this cosmic asymmetry would seed low-energy nuclear reactions in the matrix of, explaining why mitochondria actually outpace the Sun in energy output as Lane has said, providing a quantum biases to enable coherent proton tunneling for 70% efficiency. This would enable mitochondria to turn metabolic "lead" in food stuffs into energetic "gold" driving life.

**2\. Melanin now becomes biology's Dark Matter Sensor for Renovation:** Interactions described in the physics paper means this could make melanin sensitive to neutrino-dark signals, triggering UV-A renovations (380 nm). This is big in the model of the RPE-SCN in the eye. This directly ties to my LENR links in the Patreon thesis because it would allow mitochondria to alchemizes free radicals into coherent energy, boosting mitochondrial density.

**3\. Ultimate Unification: Dark Alchemy Powering Life's Miracle:** If dark matter enables neutrino transmutations cosmically, biology's LENR internalizes this for 10,000x solar density. This mimics Nick Lane's "fantastic machine" quote as the alchemical pinnacle, unifying stellar plasma with cellular quantum flows.

What are the odds dark matter exists?

The evidence for dark matter is considered
**extremely strong** by the vast majority of the scientific community. While we haven't "caught" a dark matter particle in a detector yet, the gravitational evidence is cross-confirmed by several independent methods across different scales of the universe.

Physicists often say we are "looking at the fingerprints, even if we haven't seen the thief," in the search for dark matter. So why do we believe this?

1\. Galaxy Rotation Curves
In the 1970s, Vera Rubin and Kent Ford observed that stars at the outer edges of galaxies rotate just as fast as stars near the center.
**The Problem:** Based on the visible matter (stars and gas), the outer stars should be moving much slower. At their current speeds, they should be flying off into space.
**The Conclusion:** There must be a massive, invisible "halo" of matter providing the extra gravity to hold them in.

2\. Galaxy Clusters and Weak Lensing
When we look at massive clusters of galaxies, we can "weigh" them using **Gravitational Lensing**. According to General Relativity, mass bends light.
By observing how much the light from distant background galaxies is distorted, we can calculate the total mass of the cluster.
The results consistently show about **five times more mass** than what we can see in stars and hot gas.

3\. The Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB)
This is often considered the "smoking gun." The CMB is the afterglow of the Big Bang.

By analyzing the tiny temperature fluctuations in this radiation, physicists can determine the composition of the early universe.

The mathematical "power spectrum" of these fluctuations fits perfectly with a universe made of roughly **5% normal matter, 27% dark matter, and 68% dark energy.** Without dark matter, the peaks in the data would look completely different. _Why would biology hitch its wagon to 27% when there is a 68% deeper source of power?_

4\. The Bullet Cluster
This is a famous "exception that proves the rule." When two galaxy clusters collided, the visible gas (interstellar clouds) crashed and slowed down due to friction.

However, gravitational mapping showed that the **bulk of the mass** passed straight through the collision without slowing down.

This suggests that dark matter is "collisionless", it doesn't interact with itself or normal matter except through gravity.

The Skeptical View: MOND
Is it possible our gravity math is just wrong? **Modified Newtonian Dynamics (MOND)** suggests that gravity behaves differently at very low accelerations.

| Theory | Strength | Weakness |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Dark Matter** | Explains the CMB, Lensing, and Large Scale Structure perfectly. | We haven't detected the particle (e.g., WIMPs) yet. |
| **MOND** | Explains galaxy rotation curves without needing invisible matter. | Fails to explain the CMB or the Bullet Cluster without adding extra "hidden" mass anyway. |

Summary of the Evidence
The evidence is "indirect but overwhelming." THIS DOES NOT SATISFY ME IN THE LEAST. It isn't just one weird observation; it is the fact that the **exact same amount of dark matter** is required to explain the Big Bang, the growth of galaxies, and the bending of light across the cosmos.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-02-24T01:09:36+0200

This cosmic shift is the foundation of the **QUILT framework**, explaining how life on Earth evolved to become the "fantastic machine" as Nick Lane described.

1\. Structure over Expansion: The Choice of 27%
**The Difference:** Dark matter **attracts and pulls** gravity, forming the cosmic web and galaxies, while dark energy **repels and pushes**, driving the universe's accelerated expansion.

**Biological Structure:** For mammals to evolve complex, high-energy structures like the **neocortex** and the **inverted retina**, they required an energy source that supports **linear structure formation**.

**The Evolutionary Logic:** Dark energy (68%) is a property of empty space that pushes matter apart. Dark matter (27%) is the "architect" that collapses matter into dense, organized regions.

_Why does this make sense?_

In my **decentralized thesis**, the transition from **Exogenous Photonic Dependency** to **Endogenous Magneto-Optical Autonomy** defines why mammals post-KT are characterized by a massive investment in **Time** over **Energy**. Remember Post KT mammals are costly in time and not in energy. This squares with the "Dark Matter vs. Dark Energy" logic because life is a process of **concentrating information** (Dark Matter architecture) while resisting **entropic expansion** (Dark Energy).

2\. The 10,000x Factor: Neutrino-Dark Alchemy
The 2026 physics paper suggests that **neutrinos and dark matter interact**, challenging the standard Lambda-CDM model.

**Parity Violation Amplification:** This interaction enhances **weak-force parity violation**, which I've argued seeds **Low-Energy Nuclear Reactions (LENR)** in the mitochondrial matrix.

**The Accelerator:** This is why mitochondria convert **10,000 times more energy than the sun** per gram. By internalizing the dark matter-neutrino "handshake," mitochondria move from chemical furnaces to **biological particle accelerators**, achieving **70% quantum efficiency** via coherent proton tunneling.

3\. Melanin: The Dark Matter Sensor
If dark matter governs the formation of cosmic structures, **_hydrated_** _**melanin**_ evolved as the biological sensor to "read" this 27% energy source.

**UVA Renovation:** In the **RPE-SCN model**, melanin’s sensitivity to neutrino-dark signals triggers **380 nm (UVA) renovations**.

**Alchemical Transformation:** This allows the mammalian eye to alchemize free radicals into coherent energy, maintaining the **220nm internal sun** signal. This "Factor X" explains how mammals remained "geared to the wheelwork of the universe" even when the K-T event blacked out the sun.

# Thread: ## Conditions and Levee Ties (Key Points from Theses)
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conditions-and-levee-ties-key-points-from-theses.31776/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Johan Lindøm — 2025-10-25T14:03:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conditions-and-levee-ties-key-points-from-theses.31776/post-361578>

\## Conditions and Levee Ties (Key Points from Theses)

\- Cancer: 11 (mTOR), 16 (Oncogenesis), 19 (Apoptosis loss); incoherent UPEs higher.

\- Aging: 10 (Heteroplasmy), 14 (Epigenetics), 18 (Sirtuins), 22 (Depletions); UPE coherence drops.

\- Psychiatric (Depression/Schizophrenia): 25 (Hypoxia), 30 (Light disruption); incoherent UPEs in neural tracks.

\- Baldness/Gray Hair: 30 (V-UV loss, hormonal via quantum effects); UPE loss in follicle.

\- Alpha-synucleinopathies (PD, DLB, MSA): 16 (Aggregation), 27 (HSP failure), 25 (Hypoxia); incoherent UPEs in aggregation.

\- Diabetes: 4 (Dietary), 9 (AGEs), 12 (PPAR gamma); incoherent UPEs in metabolism.

\- Multiple Sclerosis (MS): 6 (Immunity), 26 (Structure failure); UPEs incoherent in demyelination.

\- High Blood Pressure: 3 (Inflammation), 30 (Stressors); UPEs altered in vessels.

\- Arthritis: 3 (Inflammation), 6 (Immunity); UPEs in joints.

\- IBS: 5 (Brain-Gut), 3 (Inflammation); UPEs from microbiome.

\- Heart Disease: 10 (Mito signaling), 12 (PPAR gamma); incoherent UPEs in heart.

\- Infertility: 2 (Leptin), 4 (Dietary); UPEs disrupted in sex steroids.

\- Autoimmune (Psoriasis, Eczema, Rosacea, MCAS, EHS, Atopy, Anaphylaxis): 6 (Immunity), 3 (Inflammation); incoherent UPEs in immune cells.

\- Obesity: 2 (Leptin), 4 (Dietary); UPEs incoherent in fat.

\- Neurological Disorders: 13 (Signaling), 23 (Iatrogenic); UPEs altered.

\- Demyelinating (ALS, AD, PD): 26 (Structure), 10 (Mito); incoherent UPEs in myelin.

\- Guillain-Barré Syndrome: 23 (Iatrogenic), 6 (Immunity); UPEs from interventions.

\- HIV: 23 (Iatrogenic), 7 (ROS); UPEs incoherent.

\- Pulmonary Embolisms: 23 (Iatrogenic), 7 (ROS); UPEs in blood.

\- Lyme Disease: 6 (Immunity), 3 (Inflammation); UPEs from infection.

\- Bipolar Disorder: 28 (Sleep), 25 (Hypoxia); UPEs incoherent in mania.

\- Neurodegeneration: 10 (Mito), 16 (Oncogenesis); incoherent UPEs.

\- PAD: 8 (ALEs), 23 (Iatrogenic); UPEs incoherent in arteries.

\- Hypothyroidism/Hyperthyroidism: 30 (Stressors), 2 (Leptin); UPEs disrupted in thyroid.

\- Sarcoidosis: 3 (Inflammation), 7 (ROS); UPEs in granuloma.

\- Stroke (CVA): 26 (Structure), 13 (Signaling); UPEs incoherent in vessels.

\- HPA Axis Disease: 21 (Adaptogens), 2 (Leptin); UPEs altered in axis.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-10-25T18:03:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conditions-and-levee-ties-key-points-from-theses.31776/post-361594>

If you want to see the connection, try this one.

As a leader you have a responsibility to lead people well. Good leaders are trailblazers, making a path for others to follow. Great leaders, however, inspire their people to reach higher, dream bigger, and achieve greater to do things that must be done that no one has achieved. Perhaps the most important leadership skill you can develop is the ability to provide inspiration to your tribe. If you inspire them to reach for the stars, they just might bring you back the moon. **_You cannot take the leadership role lightly._**

Most people won't know where they are really going until you get them to really understand what your "WHY" is. I spoke in depth about AM sunlight in my Vermont 2017 Talk and how critical it was to get things charging in the right direction. AM sunlight is critical to get the charge and the spin in atoms on the cell membranes up and inside the cell.

I spoke about this last Sunday in the October 2025 Q & A So have a listen.

When heteroplasmy rises we are losing mitochondrial charge and spin of the atoms inside us; and as a result mitochondrial swelling = cell swelling = increased ubiquitin marking = protein turnover = very energy costly with bad mito = high heteroplasmy rate. LOSS OF SPIN = LOSS OF COHERENCE.

It begs the question what increases coherence? More sun, More darkness post sun set all WHILE GROUNDED 100% of the time. The answer is not less to any of these factors, because they arethe key to fixing a charging/spin/topologic issue. The reason is deeply tied to the two subatomic particles in the mitochondria we use. The electron and proton.

An electric charge alters the space around it in nature. It also alters the mass of particles in mitochondria itself. This is why Wallace finds inclusion bodies in heteroplastic mitochondria in his papers. It is why the cristae change their size and shape as charge and spin coherence alter them from environmental sensing. There are two kinds of charge, positive (protons) and negative (electrons), like charges repel, unlike charges attract; positive charge comes from having more protons than electrons; negative charge comes from having more electrons than protons. The

Quantum Quilt of Life: How Electron Spins, Entanglement, and Topological Defects Weave Coherence into Our Tissues

Imagine your body not as a mere machine of flesh and bone, but as a vast, shimmering quilt woven from billions of electron spins, a dynamic tapestry where tiny quantum dances give rise to the symphony of life. At the heart of this vision lies a profound question: why does nature organize us this way, with tissues as "sheets of electron spin domains" influencing every atom in our proteins and lipids? And could parity violation, that cosmic asymmetry in the universe's weak forces, be the hidden conductor here? Let's unravel this step by step, drawing from the decentralized photobioelectric thesis, where light, bioelectricity, and quantum processes sculpt reality. We'll explore how parallel spins in triplet states foster entanglement, build tissue coherence, and turn surface defects into topological powerhouses, all while pondering why this setup equips life to tame environmental chaos.

First, the basics of coherence in biology. Coherence isn't just a buzzword, it's the synchronized harmony that allows cells to function as a unified whole, much like waves aligning in a laser to produce focused light. In quantum biology, this emerges from electron spins: tiny magnetic arrows that can point "up" or "down." When electrons form triplet states, where their spins are parallel, they become resistant to quick decay, extending their lifetimes. If these triplets are separated (e.g., across cellular distances), their spins remain entangled, a quantum link where measuring one instantly affects the other, defying classical separation. This entanglement builds coherence in tissues, turning random fluctuations into organized signals. It's like threads in a quilt pulling tight: parallel spins create stable "domains" of aligned electrons, influencing oxygen (O), nitrogen (N), and carbon (C) atoms in proteins and lipids, the building blocks of our cells. Now, why the frailty link? Mitochondrial ultra-weak photon emissions (UPEs), those faint light bursts from metabolic reactions, are the cell's quantum Morse code. Becker and Levin stopped at the Morse code. I am taking you to the real action of how life operates. UPE light is the outcome from environmental sensing. It its the software of what your genome responds to. This is the mechanism of epigentics operates life in Earth. To get there you must understand charge and quantum spin. Charge and spin are quantized, meaning that charge comes in integer multiples of the elementary charge “e”, that is used in physics equations. Not important here but for the sake of learning.

What does this really imply?

This means ALL charge/spin is highly conserved in nature. Charge is a function of redox status and coherence status. In fact, mitochondriacs can use them as synonyms once they understand electrons and protons well. What does it mean for charge to be quantized in nature? Charge comes in multiples of an indivisible unit of charge, represented by the letter “e.” In other words, charge comes in multiples of the charge on the electron or the proton. These things have the same size charge, but the sign is different. A proton has a charge of +1e, while an electron has a charge of -1e. People with mitochondrial diseases have more protons with +1/2 (e) charge caught in the mitochondria and that is their real problem. We have to get rid of them by recyling them. Charge is critical to this ability. When you learn how to get rid of them their mitochondrial illnesses get a lot better. That is what I teach my members and you're getting a large dose of this on the Patreon blogs now and certainly in November 2017 webinar.

Wisdom from nature is my WHY.
Not pills,
not supplements,
not even food.
Just Bio-physics 101.
How a mitochondria really works to keep you going long and strong is a story of charge and spin.

The first step in how I get you to understanding charge and spin begins below.

# Thread: Pondering the future of humanity
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pondering-the-future-of-humanity.31782/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 16
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### K-in-Oz — 2025-10-26T09:53:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pondering-the-future-of-humanity.31782/post-361629>

Howdy all

Over the past couple of months I've read Arthur Firstenberg's The Invisible Rainbow, Joseph Mercola's EMF\*D and part of Robert O Becker's The Body Electric... and they have added much to the image that has been forming in my mind, from everything I've been learning from Dr Kruse and others. The gravity of the situation is almost beyond comprehension.... I try to share this information with some of the people around me, and they are not receptive. It feels like waking up in the middle of a horrible nightmare where the world is melting and everyone is walking around in a clown suit, asking if I'd like a cocktail or something.

What do you think the future looks like for humanity? Can we course correct? We have saturated our world with a substance that is killing us. But the ideal environment for life would require a complete collapse of the structures humans have created. And that is not about to happen.

And what can ordinary people do? I feel compelled to shout all of this from the rooftops. But of course I am not an expert in anything. But still, more people need to know this stuff.

Is it possible that if the message was spread to enough people, we could create a new world order, or are we up against too much? Too many powerful and corrupt actors.

The little girl in me wants to save the world. But the unhealthy reality of my adult self means I'm not even sure I can save myself ( ha ha).

I am curious to hear how other people think about the future for everyone and their own place in this battle, too.

I don't think the masses will change until there's a major crisis. And seeing how Covid went, I'm doubtful.

Hi Dr Kruse,

If your children were still young right now, what would you teach them about the future and their role in it?

As a parent with a young child, my instinct is of course to engender hope for the future, which internally, can be hard to reconcile with my view of a reality that is beyond disastrous.

It makes me think of how you have previously said that you are "**torn between a desire to improve the world and a desire to enjoy the world."**

I feel torn between the desire to carry on with the business of survival - and the attempt to enjoy life, made tricky by health issues - and the desire to fight for something better beyond myself and my family unit. I worry a lot about the kind of future that the children are inheriting.

### K-in-Oz — 2025-10-30T03:41:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pondering-the-future-of-humanity.31782/post-361861>

> [Mat.I said:](/goto/post?id=361713)
>
> I spread the message every chance I get, however, it has not taken long for me to realise that people do not want to be "inconvenienced" and would rather remain sick and miserable. Additionally, many people here (in OZ) are still asleep about this. We homeschool our kids and joined a community for homeschooling, they are a very food focused group.. I haven't had a chance to build my close circle of friends as there are not many people around here that really do get it.. So where does that leave us and others?? Watch on the side-lines while people live in "convenience" destroy their health and sound like a broken record, but won't do anything about it, because they are low DA and low Agency due to their light choices.. Unfortunately, you cannot get this message to the majority here as they are too busy living in their shifted world, with solar panels on their "smart" homes...

Yeah I guess it is difficult for people to accept truths when they necessitate a disruption of their life as they know it and it seems some people would rather just not. Also, the truth can hurt. When I was breastfeeding my son I would sometimes scroll on my phone to pass the time. Knowing what I know now, that truth hurts. I did that. And whilst I obviously can't change whatever damaged I've cause in the past, at least I have the information to do better in the future now.

I also don't have anyone in my immediate circle who gets it, although to be fair, I don't actually have much of a circle - haha. Unfortunately even my family who I tried to share some of this with reacted very negatively. I am finally getting my sons dad somewhat on board with this stuff though by continuing to give him pieces of information whenever he is receptive to hearing me ramble. His view seems to have now shifted from something like "surely that can't be true or we would all know" to "okay so it's probably true but what can we do about it anyway?" Which is still progress. We have also come to an agreement about homeschooling which I'm happy about.

But perhaps you are right about not being able to get this message to the majority. Although I still can't help but think about all the people who would be horrified if they could know the truth. Like all the other mothers out there who might have scrolled on their phone too while they were feeding their babies, not realising what they were doing to their poor little brains.

I read that there is a Test one should do if you were diagnosed with AFib. I am trying to learn what it is. Does anyone know? Thank you.

### Mat.I — 2025-10-28T02:13:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/labs-and-tests-for-afib.31791/post-361714>

> [MillieMartire said:](/goto/post?id=361704)
>
> I read that there is a Test one should do if you were diagnosed with AFib. I am trying to learn what it is. Does anyone know? Thank you.

I believe it may be the Echocardiogram. Maybe [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) can advise on this. There are likely a few labs that would give you some clues as to what is going on at a terrain level that could be contributing to it if the echo is clear? I guess a way to think about it could be a hardware vs a software issue.. If echo is good that would indicate that hardware is good (no mechanical/structural issues) so the cause may have been a software issue at the terrain level e.g. AFib could = a phase decoherence between the DC field and the oscillating redox network. One e.g. this can be caused by nnemf due to VGCC over activation and drives excessive intracellular Ca influx. Others could be thyroid related which tie back to redox/circadian issues anyways.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-10-28T04:22:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/labs-and-tests-for-afib.31791/post-361730>

Light at night and heart disease links are strong! This was just published this today in JAMA Network Open.

Using 13 million hours of personal light exposure data in >88,000 people, they found that those with the brightest nights had significantly higher risks of developing coronary artery disease, myocardial infarction, heart failure, **atrial fibrillation,** and stroke.

These associations were robust after adjusting for established cardiovascular risk factors, including physical activity, smoking, alcohol, diet, sleep duration, socioeconomic status, and polygenic risk. Keep your homes dark at night and get in the sun for photorepair of your arteries and heart!

[https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2840489](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2840489)

>

### Jack Kruse — 2025-10-28T04:25:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-things-a-fib.31794/post-361736>

Light at night and heart disease links are strong! This was just published this today in JAMA Network Open.

Using 13 million hours of personal light exposure data in >88,000 people, they found that those with the brightest nights had significantly higher risks of developing coronary artery disease, myocardial infarction, heart failure, **atrial fibrillation,** and stroke.

These associations were robust after adjusting for established cardiovascular risk factors, including physical activity, smoking, alcohol, diet, sleep duration, socioeconomic status, and polygenic risk. Keep your homes dark at night and get in the sun for photorepair of your arteries and heart!

[https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2840489](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2840489)

### Jack Kruse — 2025-10-28T15:09:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/curiosity-is-it-your-fuel.31795/post-361750>

Are you curious enough for your own good?

[https://www.patreon.com/posts/cpc-75-what-can-142170381](https://www.patreon.com/posts/cpc-75-what-can-142170381)

What would happen if you gave yourself permission to do something you’ve never done before? There’s only one way to find out......isn't there?

If you want a new outcome in your life you must begin by doing something you've never done before beginning right now.

Follow your own passion, not your parents’, not your friends or mentors', just tap your own.

There is no passion to be found playing small, in settling for a life that is less than the one you are capable of living. Here is a new blog to jump start this in you to create momentum in your inertia.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-10-28T15:11:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/curiosity-is-it-your-fuel.31795/post-361751>

Motivation may lift moments. But consistency builds momentum.

We chase the high of a breakthrough.

The webinar that sparks a new idea.

The meditation that delivers profound clarity.

The rush of inspiration that has us mapping out our new future at 2 AM.

We feel activated.
We feel ready.

Then, the energy fades.

The initial spark dims, and the old patterns resurface.

The self-doubt creeps back in.
The new habit feels like a chore.

We wait for the next lightning bolt of motivation, believing we can't move forward without it.

Here is the truth: Motivation is a spark. Consistency is the current.

Motivation is a fleeting chemicall surge — it’s designed to initiate, not to sustain.

Consistency is the act of rewiring.

From a neuroscience perspective, true transformation doesn't happen in a single flash of insight. It happens by carving new neural pathways, cell by cell.

It is the practice of teaching your nervous system, your body, and your energy field what your new identity feels like.

This isn't about "hustle." This is about devotion.

It’s the sacred, daily choice to show up for the vision, especially when the inspiration is quiet.

Your quantum leap isn't hiding in the next big push. It is coded into the small, rhythmic, aligned actions you take today.

Don't wait to feel motivated. Choose to be consistent.

Where are you choosing devotion over fleeting motivation this week?

✨ Momentum isn’t magic. It’s the reward of showing up for yourself — every single day.

Ready to break your pattern of start-stop energy and build unstoppable momentum from within?

Soul-Truth Line: Momentum is not built in the leap — it is built in the breath, the step, and the sacred return. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. # Thread: The BIGGEST collective psychological operation in the history of mankind.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-biggest-collective-psychological-operation-in-the-history-of-mankind.31807/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 20
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Mark Copeland — 2025-10-30T03:18:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-biggest-collective-psychological-operation-in-the-history-of-mankind.31807/post-361855>

I've been wanting to share this for a while.
This will be very uncomfortable for a lot of you guys to read, especially because a lot of us rely on this every single day.
It is well known that the billionaire creators who created a lot of the technology we use today, don't let their kids or their entire family use the technology, AND have special versions of the technology they only use for themselves and their family—not what they share to the entire world. This applies to the social media and algorithm guys, Zuck, Page, and Pichai, as well as many others including all the C-level at Microsoft and Apple. Another well known example is that TikTok in China only shows educative content, while TikTok in the rest of the world shows brainrot.

We also know that Google, Meta, and currently also starting OpenAI have huge contracts with government agencies (think DOD, NSA) for national security and curation of information, suppressing misinformation.

Not only that, all major online services heavily share and sell the data they collect from users. Even further we know that ALL online services run on AWS (Amazon), Azure (Microsoft), and Google Cloud, whom all exchange their proprietary data to profile and track users on the internet. As you are reading this, your web browser, your operating system, and the servers that host this website are profiling you. Everything is interconnected, like quantum dots. When you signup to a particular service, such as one that sells advertisements or influence via government contracts, like social media or **AI,** they buy the proprietary data and feed it to your algorithm before you start using the app. This allows them to target you in a way.

**In other words, most people don't ever think that typing in conspiracy theories in a Jack Kruse forum will change or impact what appears on their Google Searches, X, Facebook, and ChatGPT pages.**

The hole still gets deeper. If you are familiar with the software-as-a-service world, you know that proprietary data and having a data moat is a huge asset when you are building a large software business. The more data you have, the more you can fine tune your services to be improved, you can fine tune the algorithms, you can fine tune how the service works to make it efficient, easy to use, "addictive", and decide what features to add next. (if it is consumer tech not B2B). **Let's talk about a service that has billions of users using it every day for a decade, such as Google, X, or Amazon.** In that case, the targeting machine is extremely fine tuned. For social media, for example, if they have that amount of data, they can predict EXACTLY what makes you interested, happy, sad, or anxious, what will trigger you, what will make you scroll or buy something from Amazon. Combined with TRILLION-DOLLAR computers, the machine-targeting-algorithms can uncover even deeper insights about influence, targeting, and psychology, similar to how AI can generate a world war three essay or world war four essay from scratch, or generate an image of a dinosaur sitting on the moon. This allows them to have top notch government agencies and corporations as their main customers, directly buying INFLUENCE AND CONTROL. Directly buying the narratives and the dopamine of the masses. The algorithms show you the right mix of content, people, and messaging over weeks, months, and years ACROSS MULTIPLE DIFFERENT PLATFORMS to push you in the right direction of thinking by echo-chambering your ideologies (this is one method that is used, but there are many others). And if you think you can tell when it is trying to push you—_think again, these are trillion dollar computers with infinite proprietary data,_ **the human brain is no match for them.

In other words, in 2025, they don't necessarily need bioweapons, drugs, EMF-machines, or media-propaganda to control the masses like the past or like the woo-woo people preach, THEY CAN DO IT WITH YOUR CELL PHONE IN A FEW MINUTES. They can target one person, 5 people, or a whole ethnicity group.**

Every time you open your phone and decide to go on social media, Google, Reddit, or use AI, for 5 minutes, for 15 minutes, for an hour, you are letting the government control your mind. You are giving up intellectual sovereignty.

**Everyone is excited about AI, but AI has existed and been heavily used on the public for the last 15 years.**

I don't use social media. I don't even use YouTube. Here are some things you can do:
1\. Absolutely no social media. YouTube is also social media. I believe decentralized social media platforms exist, but I don't believe a lot of folks use those.
2\. Absolutely no social media.
3\. Absolutely no social media.
4\. Avoid centralized news sources—this is a waste of time. Fox, CNN, the narratives are present.
5\. Avoid Google when not necessary, especially for medical, scientific, political, and life advice.
6\. Avoid Reddit and Discord—these platforms are filled with bots and operate similar to algorithmic social media
7\. Avoid using digital notes apps to write your personal research and secrets. This will be used against you, avoid writing your personal research online unless you are trying to share the truth to other people.
8\. Avoid shopping on Amazon, this platform and algorithm are designed to subtly motivate you to spend more money and choose more expensive products. Overall the platform is sticky with many different types of subscriptions and upsells. Use eBay or a less-well-known shopping platform.
9\. Avoid Netflix and TV at all costs, protect your dopamine and guard your mind and your thoughts. Most of what is on Netflix, TV show platforms, and more nowadays is pure brainrot—no clear plot, violence, drugs, swearing, all to dumb down the masses.
10\. **I like AI, for the sole reason that it has the potential to free up your time, with a caveat.** If your work or business is online, or in the information and professional services, AI is a huge time saver and helps you make more money and accomplish more. HOWEVER, just like anything else, it is designed to spy on you and is designed to be addictive and sneak half truths into your life based on your proprietary data. I wouldn't EVER talk to AI about personal research, personal life, medicine, science, history, politics, and more topics. With that being said, it still doesn't mean you are 100% safe. Limit you tech use. I haven't used any AI in writing this post.

I hope this post convicted a lot of people. Conviction is when you experience a temporary dopamine drop, because your frontal lobes realize something you were relying on for dopamine and survival is doing more harm than good and is ultimately against you.

**In order to be a _true_ savage, you must protect your intellectual sovereignty.** Your ideas must be yours, not Facebooks.

In neurolinguistic programming (NLP), there's a concept known as "pacing and leading", a technique used to elicit a desired behavior. "Pacing" is making statements that are basically true, or at least ones that the subject will agree with. This gains rapport with the subject, allowing the hypnotist to then "lead" the subject in the desired direction--one they may not have agreed to without the initial rapport. You may criticize pacing and leading as manipulative, but at core this is how all influence works: the only difference between an NLP practitioner and most ordinary people is that ordinary people employ such techniques unconsciously.

There was a quote in this documentary that said something to the effect of "Public media figures can be used to manipulate the masses outside of their own awareness". Thus they are basically used as pawns in a game of 5D chess.

Has anyone else noticed how after Kirk's assassination Nick Fuentes has suddenly been welcomed from outside the fringes into a more public arena? I believe this is exactly what's happening here. Some people have suggested he's a fed. As of now I'd say it's more likely that he's merely being used and amplified in order for the military industrial complex to get exactly what they want, which is mass surveillance.

It's not that many of the observations Fuentes makes aren't true, but precisely because some of them are true that makes him dangerous. This allows his followers to be led towards a radical perspective which is all too easy to straw man for their own political gain.

Warburg Family Timeline:

1902: Paul Warburg moves to US, joins Kuhn Loeb.

1910: Paul at Jekyll Island, designs Federal Reserve.
1913: Fed established. WWII: Eric Warburg in OSS (precursor to CIA).
1966: Eric founds Warburg Pincus.
2008: Tim Geithner (Treasury Sec) awards BlackRock bailout contracts.
Today: Warburg Pincus manages $100B; ties to UBS ($6.9T).

That same year, President Wilson signed the Federal Reserve Act with the guidance of Frank Vanderlip, president of Rockefeller’s National City Bank.

The CFR was founded in 1921, mainly through the "mysterious" Round Table "Insider" Col. Mandel House, President Wilson's "counter-ego." It would be the U.S. equivalent of Britain's Royal Institute of International Affairs. As I found out early in my research career, the original plans for the Royal Institute of International Affairs and the Council on Foreign Relations were drawn up at Paris.

To build the envisioned network of global support, it would spend tens of millions of dollars annually from the major tax-exempt foundations such as the Carnegie and Rockefeller Foundations. "there is a GROUP WITHIN the Council on Foreign Relations which belongs to a secret society, sworn to secrecy, and which more or less controls the CFR.

...the real menace of our republic is this invisible government which like a giant octopus sprawls its slimy length over city, State and nation. ### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-18T14:07:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-the-us-was-captured.31814/post-362787>

> [michael C said:](/goto/post?id=362701)
>
> Hi Jack, I remember you mentioned William of Orange somewhere but cant remember which podcast. How does he and the VOC tie into the eventual control of the UK and US financial systems. Also besides the B'nai B'rith, how does the Chabad Lubavitch factor into the controls of various institutions in the west and also Russia?

Before Britain was a super power the Dutch came first. They were ruthless imperialists. Those scars are best seen in places like Suriname today. Next store in British Ghana you see the scars of assimilation today. The connection between William of Orange, the Dutch East India Company (VOC), and the eventual control of the UK and US financial systems lies in the adoption of Dutch financial innovations that formed the basis of modern public finance and central banking. The English assimilated all these ideas in 1666.

Charles 1 assassination and Oliver Cromwell allowed for major changes to English law that made the Glorious Revolution possible.

William of Orange (William III of England) did not directly orchestrate a takeover of the UK financial system on behalf of the VOC, but his ascension to the English throne following the Glorious Revolution of 1688 facilitated the transfer of Dutch financial models to England.
The Dutch Republic had a sophisticated financial system, including the Bank of Amsterdam (established in 1609) and the world's first formal stock exchange where shares in the VOC were traded. When William became King of England, Scotland, and Ireland, he brought with him an understanding of these systems.

England was struggling financially, largely due to costly wars with France. In 1694, the Bank of England was established by royal charter to manage government debt and finance the war effort. This institution was modeled on the Dutch system and allowed the government to borrow large sums of money at lower interest rates, creating the concept of a permanent national debt.

The VOC was the world's first publicly traded company and introduced innovations like joint-stock ownership and limited liability, which are fundamental to modern corporations.

This corporate structure, combined with the new system of public finance developed with the Bank of England, laid the groundwork for the British Empire's economic dominance and, subsequently, the development of modern capitalist financial systems in the US. They transferred this bad idea around the world at scale. The ability to raise capital efficiently was a "secret weapon" that made Great Britain a superpower.

Chabad Lubavitch movement is a prominent Hasidic Jewish movement known for its extensive global outreach and educational networks, rather than control over Western or Russian financial systems. The movement focuses on promoting Jewish observance and education through a vast network of community centers, schools, and synagogues worldwide. The idea that Chabad Lubavitch "factors into the controls of various institutions" in the West and Russia is generally considered a conspiracy theory, often linked to broader, unsubstantiated claims about Jewish influence in global finance and politics. Many sources owned by Zionist have tried to rebrand B'nai B'rith and its modern name ADL/AIPAC as a Jewish service organization committed to community and combating antisemitism, not as an entity that controls institutions. > [Nick-Rolser said:](/goto/post?id=362102)
>
> In neurolinguistic programming (NLP), there's a concept known as "pacing and leading", a technique used to elicit a desired behavior. "Pacing" is making statements that are basically true, or at least ones that the subject will agree with. This gains rapport with the subject, allowing the hypnotist to then "lead" the subject in the desired direction--one they may not have agreed to without the initial rapport. You may criticize pacing and leading as manipulative, but at core this is how all influence works: the only difference between an NLP practitioner and most ordinary people is that ordinary people employ such techniques unconsciously.
>
> There was a quote in this documentary that said something to the effect of "Public media figures can be used to manipulate the masses outside of their own awareness". Thus they are basically used as pawns in a game of 5D chess.
>

Some people have suggested he's a fed. As of now I'd say it's more likely that he's merely being used and amplified in order for the military industrial complex to get exactly what they want, which is mass surveillance.
>
> It's not that many of the observations Fuentes makes aren't true, but precisely because some of them are true that makes him dangerous. This allows his followers to be led towards a radical perspective which is all too easy to straw man for their own political gain.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-02-23T00:08:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-the-us-was-captured.31814/post-367401>

When did Israel test the nuclear weapons they stole from Pennsylvania to put into the Dimona reactor during JFK's presidency? [https://www.wilsoncenter.org/blog-p...stery-report-critical-oral-history-conference](https://www.wilsoncenter.org/blog-post/revisiting-1979-vela-mystery-report-critical-oral-history-conference)

A nuclear test, even from stolen material, leaves unmistakable evidence of a blast, primarily through radioactive fission products, distinct isotope ratios (like xenon), and, in many cases, a characteristic neutron activation signature in surrounding materials. Nuclear forensics can analyze this fallout to identify the origin of the material.

**Sheep in Australia**: Traces of **Iodine-131** (a short-lived fission product) were found in the thyroids of sheep in Western Australia and Tasmania shortly after the event.

**Wind Patterns**: Meteorological studies confirmed that fallout from a blast in the southern Indian Ocean would have been carried directly to Australia by prevailing winds.

Hydroacoustic & Ionospheric Data
Later declassified reports revealed more technical markers:

**Hydroacoustic Signals**: The [Naval Research Laboratory (NRL)](https://nsarchive.gwu.edu/briefing-book/nuclear-vault/2016-12-06/vela-incident-south-atlantic-mystery-flash-september-1979-raised-questions-about-nuclear-test) analyzed underwater sound recordings and identified signals "unique to nuclear shots in a maritime environment" emanating from the Prince Edward Islands.

**Ionospheric Disturbances**: The Arecibo Observatory in Puerto Rico detected an "anomalous traveling disturbance" in the upper atmosphere moving from the southeast, consistent with a massive energy release in the southern Indian Ocean.
A 2022 study of NASA satellite data found a "trace" in the ozone layer left by the blast's shockwave roughly 17 minutes after the flash.

While most independent researchers and many former U.S. officials believe it was a joint **Israeli-South African test**, it remains an "unconfirmed" mystery because neither government has ever admitted to it, but many classified CIA documents related to the JFK assassination have said that the CIA has isotopic evidence that this test links back to the Dimona reactor and the Apollo event that I mentioned in the Danny Jones podcast.

# Thread: Never Done a Digital Journal: Here Goes
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/never-done-a-digital-journal-here-goes.31816/>

### Tierratrue — 2025-10-31T18:35:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/never-done-a-digital-journal-here-goes.31816/post-361961>

Brand new and first post. Next will be Meet and Greet.

For my optimal life: I have been thrust from a matralineal history of abondonment and especially abondonment of self. I break those chains. Started out black sheep and moving to black swan.

My great grandmother died giving herself an abortion after my grandmother was born a year earlier in 1923. Sounds like a sentence and a difficult life unsupported with dire and probably poor decision making capabilities. Not sure of the details although I had a vision of her 4 years ago dying with a pool of blood in child's pose. I heard my great grandfather, Joe (from Sicily) was an asshole.

My grandmother growing up motherless became the theme. From my mom's point of view she loved her sons and didn't know how to lover her and picked on her/made her the work horse of the household from a young age. My grandmother loved me, but apparently not my mom.

My parents divorced in their 20's when my brother and I were 1 and 4. My mom couldn't handle single motherhood and gave us to my dad to raise with my paternal grandmother and soon to be stepmother at age 8. My mom joined the high life of parties, coke, and drinking while was too young to even know.

A childhood athlete and overachiever in school became my coping mechanisms. They worked for a time. I chased health and stayed lean and undernourished as a teenager to fit my sport. Menses at age 15 and battled with amenorhea until my first child at 25. Then my cycle took over and regulated like clockwork. I continued to chase health and fasted and followed a raw food diet. Never vegan or vegetarian. I always loved being outside and practically worshipped anything under the clear sky, sun, moon, and stars. I camped, backpacked, and slept out doors as much as possible in my 20's and with my kid. Her dad was an asshole and I left him by age 30, went to nursing school and ended up labor and delivery. Made sense as I focused to heal the generational wounds. I cherished my homebirth, pain, and labor process. Totally cathartic for me. I remarried at 35 (not an asshole) and had 2 more kids at 36 and 40. Amazing births, totally natural, deep and animalistic. I loved the transformation and the right of passage. I burnt the candle at both ends and worked night shift in the hospital, became the over achiever mom and was continued my athletic/health journey and started crossfit, haha! Got really strong, really more muscular and hit an emotional wall at 46. Perimenopause. Health was ok, but had some basal cell skin cancer issues. Prob low vit D and blue light. Just quit over achieving to heal. Went on a mom strike. Started to give back to myself. To be continued...

### Tierratrue — 2025-11-03T19:55:27+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/never-done-a-digital-journal-here-goes.31816/post-362075>

Interesting thought, but I don't really resonate with it. Witnessing and caring for women in over 1000 births, the few that I have seen that are raw and spontaneous have a transformative effect on the women. The beta endorphin level, I believe, has the opposite effect of pain being a negative input. It is highly beneficial and euphoria producing and supportive to the surrender process that happens in birth. It sets up the flow of many steps post birth, including the neonates ability to navigate unassisted to the breast beginning the other steps of a healthy healing from birth.

Birth does not ruin your "figure." In fact if you care for yourself in the tradition of rest and don't jump back into bullshit crossfit at 6 weeks and ruin your tender rebuilding pelvic floor that sets you up for peeing yourself the rest of your life, bladder slings, prolapses, and hysterectomies, and replace that time with natural light you may come out the otherside much stronger. And exclusive breastfeeding is a huge metabolic process that easily allow the postpartum mother to shed weight too fast if she is not careful to rest and eat enough.

As far as being treating your kids poorly, lots of reasons for that. Emotional and impulse control problems, mastering thoughts, nnEMF, social stress etc... probably much more likely.

Current: Vit D at 25 and tan after a full summer of every sunrise, beach grounding, hours in 10-2 light and many sunsets. That's what Jack says about CA. Having tested beyond basic vit D, but I do suspect it will be shit and I am going into winter now at 37 latitude.

### Tierratrue — 2025-12-04T20:11:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/never-done-a-digital-journal-here-goes.31816/post-363592>

The weaving of the quilt for me in following Jack's work started in April 2025 where I was exposed to the Danny Jones podcast. I then went on to watch/listen to every podcast of his that I could find. I joined Patreon read a little but it dumped me so deeply into the weeds that I had little context for all the details. I just went with the basics. Sunrise (fogrise) on coastal CA every morning without miss. Grounding bear walks on the beach, cold exposure (I have been doing since 2018) now regularly in the Pacific (cheap and accessible). At this time one of my dear friends died of a turbo cancer in 3 days in her 40s. It put me off my work on zoom extensively. I just couldn't approach it. I didn't compute exactly why. But knew in my gut it was right. The practical application lasted all summer. I worked on my tan spent hours in the sun. All to find out my vit D was 25 at the end of summer. I had stopped supplementing with D a few years ago, but it had gotten my vit D level in the 60's back then. I went back to my 23 and me health result where I had a memory that I had the SNP for low vit D receptor protein . Then I went back to the Epi Paleo solution and read about people with this SNP need very high circulating levels of vit D to achieve optimal vit D levels. I also have the white spot in my skin/tan. Something is wrong with my "cholesterol rafts" that Jack talks about that I don't fully understand yet. I joined here in October and have had less than enough involvement. I want to comb thru this forum but I still have aversion to computer work when the sun is shining outside and night time screen use seems abominable in my gut. My next stop was printing the Melanin Renovation Prescription. I am now on my second round of reading it, as well as Quantum Thermodynamic 2 and CPC 17. I still haven't started supplementing vit D and I quit coffee 2 weeks ago. The connection of my skin and gut has been apparent to me. I would call my gut state "irritable bowel" as I have never been able to be regular. I am not uncomfortable, but sometimes go 2 or 3 days without a bowel movement. When I do, they are usually great, smooth, and like a banana. I don't seem to have the alternating diarrhea/constipation that many do with IBS. Although I have flirted with it for short periods of time (2 weeks or so), 3 or more episodes of that in last 3 years. I used to intermittent fast by skipping breakfast and eating 2 meals a day and often into the late of the evening. This pattern was predominant from my 20's until now. In September I started eating BAB by 8:30am with a lot of animal protein, a little carb and some fats and lunch at 2pm or so. No food after sunset. At first I had to force myself to eat breakfast, but now with the longer fast between 2-4p and 8am, I am ready to eat in the morning. Getting back to my skin, I have had multiple skin cancers on my face, back, arms, and chest removed. These were mostly in my 30's and early 40's. When I supplemented with D I didn't have any for years. All of them basal cell and 1 squamous cell. I have something growing on back right now that feel like skin cancer! Skin-gut-brain.

I would love some assistance on whether I should supplement with D again. I am getting that there is a risk ratio of calcium flow into my arteries in a 5G world.

After a journey to ES and back now feel more motivated than ever to be there.

Spent last 4 months caring for my disabled mother in cognitive decline in my home: Major anchor. Bandwidth tapped. No journaling. Downtime at the beach and in the water and that was it. ### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-01T01:44:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-will-the-us-break-free-from-capture.31817/post-361974>

Last year at the member event I told attendees I would make a comment on what I think in November 2025 at the end of this cycle.

Here is your payoff.

If you’re short the US market now you’ll be left with a lot of Weimar marks. Shorting a dead asset just gives you a lot of worthless paper. How do you short securities unpinned by worthless paper? Own as much bitcoin as possible.

Bitcoin is the only possibly debasement hedge.
Gold is an inflationary hedge.
Real estate will be taxed away by the state so sell it early.

Gold exploded higher. Bonds rallied. Yields fell across the curve. Stocks sagged. VIX spiked. Bitcoin bled. The tape confirms a hard rotation into fear collateral. This is not strength. This is panic. Gold at 4310 is a blow off. The move lacks structure. It is vertical and emotional. Miners chase it but lag. That is exhaustion. The macro explains it.

Bonds bid because liquidity snapped. Dollar weakens because collateral preference shifted to metals for the day. Equities dump because volatility resets policy expectations. Bitcoin falls because leveraged money has to cover duration and dollar shorts. This is not a rejection of digital collateral. It is margin calls. BRICS cheers because gold’s rise feeds their propaganda. They claim a new settlement order built on metal. But that system is old world liquidity. It cannot scale. It cannot settle at speed. It cannot collateralize AI or energy. The hash dollar system does. Compute power is the new refinery. Joules convert to proof. Proof converts to trust.

The United States holds the compute infrastructure. The ETFs hold the custody rails. Treasury holds the forfeitures. Washington holds the levers. BRICS have atoms. America has electrons. This blow off proves it. When gold rallies this fast it is because the fiat structure shook. When it fades it will prove the new anchor is not yellow metal but verified energy. The digital collateral regime absorbs volatility while the commodity bloc wastes it. The United States is building a reserve system that fuses energy, computation, and custody. BRICS are burning time. Gold’s spike is the scream of an old order losing breath.

The only way to short the world in 2025 and onward is to own bitcoin.

The Fed nationalized risk in the GFC. As a consequence, fiat is now hospice care. Gold survived every collapse but never escaped the control of the criminal elite on Wall St and in Washington DC.
Every empire confiscated it or pegged it to debt.
Rome clipped coins.
FDR outlawed private gold.
London Gold Pool rigged price for a decade.

Every time gold became the exit, governments turned it into collateral for the same system. It’s static. Slow. Heavy. That’s why it can’t be the weapon now. Bitcoin is a different animal because it monitizes energy via electricity.

Proof of work ties value to physics, not politics.
Every hash burns real energy.
Every block embeds cost.
That’s why it’s the real short trade.
It’s the mirror image of a zero-cost fiat credit system.

The deeper the Fed digs into synthetic liquidity, the stronger Bitcoin’s fundamental claim becomes.

BURRY still see bubbles through the lens of credit cycles. He doesn’t understand the new collateral layer being built by Bitcoin.

Bitcoin is the short on the entire yield curve. It’s short duration, short counterparty, short bureaucracy.
Gold stores history.
Bitcoin stores verification.

In 2025, you don’t short the world with a rock. Own BTC. Long [MARA](https://x.com/search?q=%24MARA&src=cashtag_click) and MSTR.
Own American energy for the next decade. That’s the only SAVAGE trade now.

# Thread: DO WE HAVE PROOF OF JUST HOW CENTRALIZED SCIENCE IS IN THE MODERN WORLD?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-we-have-proof-of-just-how-centralized-science-is-in-the-modern-world.31822/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-03T03:32:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-we-have-proof-of-just-how-centralized-science-is-in-the-modern-world.31822/post-362047>

The first Nobel Prizes were awarded in 1901, specifically on December 10, the anniversary of Alfred Nobel's death. So, there has been only 124 years of awards. You would expect a randomized distribution of winners but what you see when you look is data that shows just how centralize science has been since 1901.

# Thread: DO WE HAVE PROOF THAT ENVIRONMENT MATTERS MORE THEN GENES ON EARTH?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-we-have-proof-that-environment-matters-more-then-genes-on-earth.31823/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-03T03:48:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-we-have-proof-that-environment-matters-more-then-genes-on-earth.31823/post-362048>

**DO WE HAVE PROOF THAT ENVIRONMENT MATTERS MORE THEN GENES ON EARTH?**

If 8 billion of us all have DNA that is 99.9% the same why does this geographical strata exist based on Watson and Crick biological dogma?

The Watson-Crick central dogma (DNA → RNA → protein) describes how genetic information flows, but it doesn't explain that the thermodynamics of 37 genes control the ability of 23000 nuclear genes to live. I find that ironic.

Humans are 99.9% genetically identical, meaning the average difference between any two people is just 0.1% of our 3 billion DNA base pairs, or roughly 3 million variations.

Might it be that the epigenetics that come from the interaction of the environment with a genome is more important that 23K nuclear genes? Might this tell why we should be spendingless money on nDNA research in the NIH budget, and more on mtDNA genomes and epigenetic studies? Wasting our time on nDNA ideas for diseases seem to be the business plan to enrich corporations in BigHarma and Tech, doesn't it? This way we can treat humans for the whole life instead of reversing their diseases so that no centralized solutions become a chronic crutch.

# Thread: ?? About the changes I need to implement
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/about-the-changes-i-need-to-implement.31831/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### JWwantswisdom — 2025-11-04T11:09:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/about-the-changes-i-need-to-implement.31831/post-362111>

Thanks to all who respond. I'm male 65 yrs young. I live in So Cal, about 29 miles east of Los Angeles. I worked for 20+ yrs working swing shift in warehouses under fluorescent lights 11 yrs and perhaps halogen lights 12 yrs. Working from like 4:30 pm to 1:00 am or later. Not much sun except for weekends. Then 20+ yrs in an office building setting under fluorescent lighting and working in front of computer screens.
I'm fatigued a lot. I've been trying to get out in the sun daily but it's usually after noontime. I'm desirus of building my health back. I'm 5'10" and about 225 lbs. I've been watching podcasts trying to learn about light, water and magnetism. I'm amazed at Dr. Kruses mind and memory. I want to get my redox levels or ability up. I want to get my mitochondria healthy and energy up. Anyone who can suggest a plan of attack or some guidance would be most appreciated. I use some blue blocker readers but just ordered a much better pair. I have an RO unit for water and take electrolytes from time to time. We use Redmonds Sea Salt with lots of trace minerals. I have access to a functional trainer and some weights. With my current low energy levels I don't use them as much as I'd like. I've been married to the love of my life since 1987. We have a son, a daughter in-law and a two yr old grandson. We been blessed. I want to be a better husband, father, granddad and getting healthier I believe is a big step in that goalset. Anyway, I any and all suggestions are much appreciated and thank you in advance.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-11-04T15:17:11+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/about-the-changes-i-need-to-implement.31831/post-362112>

Set a clock and see the AM sunrise for an hour every day before you do anything.

### JWwantswisdom — 2025-11-04T19:49:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/about-the-changes-i-need-to-implement.31831/post-362151>

Yes sir. I'll start there. Thank you for caring enough to respond. And how can I get a tack sharp, photographic mind like yours? Would cold showers be a worthwhile addition to get my body to make it's own light? If so should I start that right away or how long getting sunrises in my eyes before trying to adopt anything else? Thank you and your tribe again for any and all reply's, suggestions and truths.

# Thread: I Have Cancer and I"m Trying To Heal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/i-have-cancer-and-i-m-trying-to-heal.31842/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### trying to heal — 2025-11-06T19:36:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/i-have-cancer-and-i-m-trying-to-heal.31842/post-362254>

Hello, 57 year old woman here, living in central Florida and diagnosed with a rare form of blood/bone marrow cancer a little over 2 years ago called Myleofibrosis. My father had a similar blood cancer called Polycythenia Vera, so maybe it runs in my family, I don't know and neither does my doctor. Basically, my bone marrow is turning into scar tissue. I've refused all of the traditional "treatments" from my oncologist, including a stem cell transplant, which they say is the only way to save my life. I don't take vaccines, I dont' eat any processed foods, I drink distilled water only, I cook all of my own food from scratch with pure ingredients, I make and eat fermented foods, I get about 4 hours of sun per week but my vitamin D blood tests show only a 28 which I don't understand. Might be because of the cancer? I don't know. I can't take vitamin D supplements because they give me insane heart palpitations and insomnia. I don't understand that either. I take a bunch of supplements to help shut down the metabolic pathways of my cancer and right now my monthly bloods are "stable", not getting worse so I'm happy for that. My question is this, anything else I could be doing to heal from this? The supplements I take daily are, Dan Shen, ECGC, Dandelion Root, Magnesium Glyciate, Ginger Root, Quercetin, Curcumin, Apolactoferrin, Stinging Nettle Leaf, and my bioidentical hormones replacement creams since i'm post menopausal. The only prescription medication I take is gabapentin for my severe restless leg syndrome at night and insane insomnia........which I didn't have before getting sick with cancer so I know it's related somehow...and a baby asprin for my blood and a Zyrtec for allergies. . Before getting sick I wasn't on any prescription meds at all and would visit a doctor maybe every 10 years for something minor like a sore throat. Is there anything else I could be doing for my health? I work out with my grandson 3 days a week at the gym for 1 hour a day and walk a mile on my treadmill at home on alternate days. I am about 30lbs overweight which I'm slowly working on. No root canals, no metal fillings, and I live in a nice house with no mold or sanitation issues at all. I have doen my homework on fenben and ivermectin which I've tried, but it didn't help. I don't eat any wheat anymore as it flairs my inflammation levels and very limited fruit and sugar. I don't smoke or drink. Thanks so much for reading this.

### ToothDriller — 2025-11-06T20:16:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/i-have-cancer-and-i-m-trying-to-heal.31842/post-362256>

First sun is layered. You have to start with sunrise and grounding, then 30 minutes minimum of UVA light (1 hour after sunrise). followed by UVB. I would tell you to bake in the sun as cancer is a problem of broken apoptosis and autophagy.
Second RLS is a sleep disorder. So do you snore? Do you have sleep apnea? Have you ever screened. If you have a sleep disorder you are missing the key component of healing and repair.
What is your evening light situation. Do you block blue light? Are you surrounded by nnEMF.
If your Vit D is only 28 you are either not getting enough sun (no sunscreen, no sunglasses) or something is blocking the conversion (blue light, nnEMF or lacking cholesterol).
Lots of questions need answering before suggestions can be made.

Thanks so much for your reply. I never wear sunglasses or sunscreen, I try to get as much sun on as much skin as possible. I don't snore, maybe very rarely, no sleep apnea or anything like that. I never had a sleep problem until I got cancer, it's related somehow. They just don't know how, nobody has figured it out yet but it's one of the symptoms of this cancer and my insomnia is severe. I can't eat any protein after 3:00 PM or else I won't sleep at all that night. I forgot to mention that I also take 1000mg magnesium at night to help sleep. I eat a ton of eggs, it's my main protein source so I get a lot of cholesterol. We use incandescent bulbs in the house, and I have one Chromebook that I use daily.
