# Thread: EPSTEIN WAS BORN VIA IRAN CONTRA AFFAIR
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/>
**Subforum:** The Kruse Longevity Center
**Posts:** 18
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:29:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364083>

**EPSTEIN FILES IN SUMMATION**

When a Southern Air Transport plane was shot down over Nicaragua in October 1986, the world got a rare window into U.S. government covert activity. Southern Air Transport was founded as a small cargo airline in 1947, the same year the Office of Strategic Services evolved into the Central Intelligence Agency, as the U.S. pivoted to a Cold War posture. The agency owned the airline outright from 1960 until 1973, at which point it was sold to the same man, Stanley G. Williams, who had run the company since the Kennedy administration.

The downing of the plane, and the testimony of its lone survivor, Eugene Hasenfus, pulled a string that eventually unraveled the scandal known as Iran-Contra. Using Southern Air Transport planes, the CIA was shipping weapons to Iran, using Israel as a middleman, and deploying the profits to arm the Contras against the leftist Nicaraguan government.

None of it was legal, and Southern Air Transport was getting too hot. In need of a new mission, the company relocated its headquarters from Miami, Florida, to Columbus, Ohio. By 1995, the company had rebranded by flying imported shipments of clothing from China. But for three years in Columbus, the airline continued to be dogged by rumors it had been—or was still—involved in smuggling.

According to veteran Columbus journalist Bob Fitrakis, who provided his historical reporting on the topic to Drop Site and The American Conservative, investigators in both the Franklin County Sheriff’s Office and Ohio’s Office of Inspector General were looking into Southern Air Transport amid rising public scrutiny of the Iran-Contra affair—and sources in both offices identified Jeffrey Epstein as having a pivotal role in relocating the planes.

At the time, Epstein was a relatively obscure financier managing the money and real estate investments of Ohio-based fashion and retail mogul Leslie Wexner. Under his stewardship of the Wexner empire, the planes that previously carried arms to Iran and Nicaragua were repurposed to deliver clothes to feed Wexner’s network of retail chains, including Victoria’s Secret and Abercrombie & Fitch.

Southern Air Transport abruptly declared bankruptcy on October 1, 1998—exactly one week before the CIA Inspector General released its official findings on the Iran-Contra affair linking the airline to allegations of Contra cocaine trafficking from Nicaragua. Under pressure from the governor’s office, Ohio officials dropped their inquiries, meaning that Epstein’s role never became public.

How did Epstein end up moving the former Contra planes to Columbus? Answering that question—or at least getting close—requires a closer look at the men behind the scandal that defined the second half of the Reagan administration, and gave the public the clearest look inside the U.S. government’s clandestine global operations in a generation or more. Like a spy service Forrest Gump, Jeffrey Epstein can be found there every leg of the way.

All the intel forces in the free world all had a social club:
SAFARI CLUB KENYA,
SAFARI CLUB IRAN French intel (Jean luc Brunel),
British intel (Douglas Leese, MI6, Epstein’s mentor),
Israeli intel (Ehud Barak-Mossad), Saudi intel (adnan KHASHOGGI)
US intel (Bill Clinton, Jeff Epstein)

And others would meet up have pedo parties, would do these Huge weapons deals, Trafficking deals, Drug deals (for their cartels), And their brokers (all men above) would get 10 percent of the signatory’s net worth. = $$$ LES WEXNER was Epstein’ handler- (he wanted to create an American Bullingdon club.)

EHUD BARAK (formerly Israel), Was funneling weapons To Iran through EPSTEIN,
JEFF introduced BARAK to the Saudi weapons dealer ADNAN KHASHOGGI,
Who introduced The Iranian contact to Ehud Barak. HiLLARY CLINTON- was employed by ROSE BANK / FIRM

ROSE BANK/FIRM - a bank that was working with BCCI. This all happened under the head of the CIA and former PNAC Member, GEORGE W BUSH whose father was an asset too. This ordeal, when discovered, would be called IRAN CONTRA

Deals would be Facilitated through Bear Sterns through a Shadow bank called BCCI. This is how Epstein went from employee to client at Bear Sterns using Wexner money to fuel his rise.

The BCCI served to launder money, particularly for Saudi Arabia and the United States—whose CIA director in 1976, George H. W. Bush, had a personal account. "The Safari Club needed a network of banks to finance its intelligence operations. With the official blessing of George Bush as the head of the CIA, Adham transformed a small Pakistani merchant bank, the Bank of Credit and Commerce International (BCCI), into a worldwide money-laundering machine, buying banks around the world in order to create the biggest clandestine money network in history." BCCI also served as an intelligence gathering mechanism by virtue of its extensive contacts with underground organizations worldwide. "They contrived, with Bush and other intelligence-service heads, a plan that seemed too good to be true. The bank would solicit the business of every major terrorist, rebel, and underground organization in the world. The invaluable intelligence thus gained would be discreetly distributed to 'friends' of the BCCI." -Wikipedia

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:35:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364087>

Stanley Pottinger, as it happens, was a notable figure in the scandal that became known as Iran-Contra, in which the CIA used Israel as a middleman to move off-the-books weapons to Iran. In the early 1980s, under the CIA’s supervision, Pottinger advised an Iranian banker on shipping embargoed arms to Iran using fraudulent paperwork and overseas “dummy companies”—in the very same period that Pottinger and Epstein worked together selling “tax-avoidance” strategies from a penthouse by Central Park. Pottinger’s system eventually gave rise to a network of covert intermediaries shipping arms around the world; the CIA’s profits became a slush fund used to illegally bankroll the insurgent Contra army, who waged a war against Nicaragua’s leftist government while simultaneously trafficking cocaine to the United States.

The other figure from Epstein’s past, Douglas Leese, meanwhile, is described by The Times as “a defense contractor with extensive connections in the arms industry and the British government.” What he did with those connections and where he trafficked those arms is left unexplored by the paper—a look at Bermuda financial records and Leese’s own lawsuit filed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Miami, suggests he was working with the U.S. government and linked to a Chinese arms manufacturer. The Times also failed to note that Epstein and Leese had a mutual associate in Adnan Khashoggi, the notorious money launderer and weapons trafficker—who was also a central player in the Iran-Contra affair.

The Times did find that Epstein was “a relentless scammer” who “abused expense accounts, engineered inside deals and demonstrated a remarkable knack for separating seemingly sophisticated investors and businessmen from their money.” The contrast between what The Times found noteworthy about his relationship with his penthousemate Pottinger—he initially stiffed the broker!—and what they failed to notice is stark. In order to acquit Epstein of any connections to intelligence agencies, the paper of record instead crafted Epstein into an antisemitic caricature of historic proportions. We put this take to The Times, and were told by spokesperson Danielle Rhoades Ha, “We report on facts that we are able to confirm, not supposition.”

Of course, it could be an extraordinary coincidence that Epstein shared a penthouse with an Iran-Contra lawyer, worked for an Iran-Contra arms dealer, and then, as we report below, moved the Iran-Contra planes to Ohio for use by billionaire retail mogul Leslie Wexner. It may simply be a coincidence that Ehud Barak, one of Epstein’s closest friends, was the head of Israel’s military intelligence during the planning for Iran-Contra, and he supervised the CIA’s first delivery. But it might also be something The Times should look a bit closer at, if they’re so inclined.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:41:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364088>

In 1981, Jeffrey Epstein resigned from Bear Stearns amid suspicions of insider trading, and began traveling regularly to London, where he grew close with the family of Douglas Leese, a British businessman with a long career in auto and aerospace manufacturing. Epstein became Douglas Leese’s protégé and fast friends with his sons Nicholas and Julian, according to [a podcast interview](https://www.tompattinson.com/gislaine-podcasts) later given by the latter. [https://www.tompattinson.com/gislaine-podcasts](https://www.tompattinson.com/gislaine-podcasts)

After World War II, Douglas Leese had been managing director of his father’s company, Cam Gears, a steering-gear manufacturer that supplied Jaguar, Ford, Nissan, and other global auto brands. In 1965, the company was sold to TRW, a U.S. aerospace conglomerate known for satellites and intercontinental ballistic missiles.

1979 was a revolutionary year in the Persian Gulf—Saddam Hussein became president of Iraq and swiftly executed and imprisoned his political rivals, while, across Iraq’s eastern border, [the people of Iran overthrew the CIA-backed Shah](https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/in-first-cia-acknowledges-1953-coup-it-backed-to-overthrow-leader-of-iran-was-undemocratic). During Iran’s revolution, university students seized the U.S. embassy in Tehran and took Americans as hostages, leading the U.S. to impose harsh economic and military sanctions.

The CIA planned to fuel a war between Iran and Iraq, to [ensure neither](https://www.jstor.org/stable/4328101) Saddam Hussein nor Ayatollah Khomeini could gain control of the Strait of Hormuz, while [keeping](https://www.cia.gov/resources/csi/static/Fighting-Iran.pdf) the Soviet navy out as protector of the Gulf. But the hostage crisis had added a wrinkle to their plans. After the 1979 revolution, the U.S. was prohibited from selling weapons to Iran, as any overt weapons deals would violate an official arms embargo and undermine President Ronald Reagan’s public position that America did not bargain with terrorists.

Instead, in a strategy aimed at reducing Soviet influence with Iran, the CIA tacitly supported weapons sales from China, and Beijing [began](https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/docs/%28EST%20PUB%20DATE%29%20CHINAS%20STA[15674890].pdf) shipping armaments to both Iran and Iraq in 1980. In spring 1983, Iran signed a [$1.3 billion arms deal](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1984/04/03/china-sells-arms-to-iran-via-n-korea/c425f361-4e38-4b92-bba5-b8bd5cf22fb0/) with China. These weapons were supplied in part by Chinese manufacturing conglomerate Norinco [using British Hong Kong as the transshipment point](https://jmqmil.sina.cn/dgby/doc-ifyquixe3758699.d.html).

Douglas Leese at the time owned a Bermuda holding company, Lorad. Soon after the Iran arms deal was signed, a new Lorad entity, [a shell company called Norinco Lorad](https://datalog.co.uk/browse/detail.php/CompanyNumber/BM10097/NORINCO+LORAD+LIMITED), was formed in Bermuda; a Hong Kong trading company called Lorad Far East followed a few months later.

Leese’s exact role in China’s weapons sales has never been made public. But in 1995, a British MP—George Galloway, in fact—alleged Leese had [clandestinely funded](https://publications.parliament.uk/pa/cm199596/cmhansrd/vo960124/debtext/60124-51.htm)Middle East arms deals using a Bermuda bank. That year, the owners of British retail chain Littlewoods raised alarm bells about Leese’s arms trafficking ties, after the company received a [proposal](https://www.the-independent.com/news/business/littlewoods-faces-163-1m-far-east-lawsuit-1611215.html) for Norinco to sell washing machines to Littlewoods and weapons to Lorad.

Two years later, in a U.S. civil complaint against the Littlewoods owners, Leese claimed his work concerned “highly-sensitive” projects “believed to be classified by the Department of Defense and other agencies of the United States government.”

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:48:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364089>

Meanwhile, the CIA prepared its own covert pipeline to ship American-made weapons to Iran. In the fall of 1980, the FBI placed Cyrus Hashemi, an Iranian banker, under extensive electronic surveillance, recording tens of thousands of conversations over a five-month span. The tapes revealed that John Stanley Pottinger, Hashemi’s attorney, was [helping](https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/docs/CIA-RDP88-01070R000201220005-8.pdf) the Iranians circumvent the arms embargo using phony invoices and overseas shell companies. The Senate Foreign Relations Committee later [found](https://archive.org/details/ReportOfTheSpecialCounselOnTheOctoberSurpriseAllegationsAndTheCircumstancesSurro/mode/1up) that the CIA was involved in planning the arms deals and had met with Hashemi in Pottinger’s office.

Pottinger, it turns out, was working together with Epstein in New York. Pottinger had previously served as an Assistant Attorney General under President Richard Nixon—now, he joined up with another “crook,” and the two men rented a penthouse office together on Central Park South, according to the New York Times. The Times reported that Pottinger and Epstein were pitching “tax avoidance” strategies for wealthy clients, and noted that the business partnership was “short-lived.” In 1984, Pottinger was [identified](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1984/07/19/2-plead-guilty-in-iran-arms-case/e1f20510-2c93-46a0-909a-29c29490fb4a/) in a federal indictment against Hashemi for illegal arms exports, and Hashemi fled to England.

Pottinger escaped prosecution after the FBI’s incriminating tapes of his conversations mysteriously disappeared; he went on to [make a fortune on real estate deals](https://www.nytimes.com/2024/11/29/us/politics/j-stanley-pottinger-dead.html) in the 1980s, and became a New York Times’ bestselling novelist. His Times obit from last year reports that his final spy thriller remains unpublished. Hashemi died in 1986 after being infected with “a rare and virulent form of leukemia” that was diagnosed only two days before he died. (His death was [later alleged](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1987-06-13-mn-6868-story.html) to be foul play.)

After Hashemi’s indictment, another player stepped in to broker access to Iran for the Americans: Saudi arms dealer Adnan Khashoggi, uncle of slain Washington Post journalist Jamal Khashoggi. In July 1985, Hashemi, Khashoggi, and Israeli Prime Minister Shimon Peres had [met secretly](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1987/01/06/sting-informant-had-2nd-role-court-told/a62a020d-46bf-47f5-928e-0d48269be2ae/) in Hamburg, West Germany, to hatch a plot: With CIA director William Casey’s blessing, the U.S. would ship the weapons to Israel, Israel would sell its own weapons to Iran, and Washington would commit to replenishing Israel’s stockpile later.

Epstein obtained an Austrian passport with a false name and an address in Saudi Arabia at some time in the 1980s. After his arrest in 2019, U.S. authorities discovered it in a safe in his New York mansion. At a bail request hearing, Epstein’s attorneys [claimed](https://www.courthousenews.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/EpsteinBrief07162019.pdf) it came from a “friend,” intended to conceal his Jewish identity in case of a potential kidnapping while traveling. Seven Americans, including a CIA officer, were kidnapped in Lebanon between 1984 and 1985, and discussions emerged around an “arms-for-hostages” trade with Iran.

After Peres [agreed to facilitate](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1987/01/06/sting-informant-had-2nd-role-court-told/a62a020d-46bf-47f5-928e-0d48269be2ae/) Khashoggi’s shipments to Iran, the logistics were handled by Israeli military intelligence. Epstein’s close friend and confidante, Ehud Barak, was the head of Israel’s military intelligence directorate (AMAN) [during the planning phases](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1987-01-11-mn-4043-story.html), from April 1983 to September 1985—he left the position one month after the first arms shipment was completed. To this day, Barak [maintains](https://x.com/DropSiteNews/status/1992644735912050757) that he was introduced to Epstein by Shimon Peres at a “public event” in 2003, after he left government service. Barak has also falsely claimed that he barely knew Epstein. Whether they truly met before 2003 is unknown.

The Israeli arms pipeline depended on a fragile trust. The Israelis wanted cash up front, but the Iranians would only pay after the weapons were delivered. Acting as [the “bank,”](https://irp.fas.org/congress/1992_rpt/bcci/11intel.htm) using accounts at the Bank of Credit and Commerce International (BCCI), Khashoggi advanced tens of millions of dollars in credit so that weapons could move even when the parties [did not trust each other](https://irp.fas.org/congress/1992_rpt/bcci/11intel.htm). Ghaith Pharaon, a Stanford-educated businessman close to the Saudi royal family, [acquired](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1991-08-15-fi-822-story.html) regional banks and distressed insurance companies in the U.S., to loop BCCI into U.S. financial markets.

The CIA [shielded](https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/docs/CIA-RDP99-01448R000401700007-0.pdf) BCCI from federal investigators, to conceal the money trail to their illicit arms deals. BCCI operated as a Cayman Islands entity [structured as a charitable trust](https://irp.fas.org/congress/1992_rpt/bcci/04crime.htm), funneling capital into employee-benefit funds and philanthropic foundations in the UK and South Asia, which in turn owned a plethora of shell companies. The shells served as parking lots for BCCI assets, and conduits for transactions that needed to be hidden from the balance sheets of the bank’s local branches around the world. In practice, BCCI founder Agha Hasan Abedi and his small circle of deputies controlled the entire flow of money with almost no outside oversight.

With each successful delivery, an American hostage was freed in Lebanon, and the intermediaries earned handsome commissions. Once arms profits had been cycled through BCCI’s network, real estate was a method of transforming suspicious cash flows into legitimate sales and rental income, while obscuring the “true” ownership behind layers of shells. BCCI was heavily involved in real estate lending and property purchases through shells and nominees and Khashoggi himself had massive real estate holdings worldwide, including hotels, ranches, mansions, and commercial properties.

Decades before Epstein became a household name, former Israeli intelligence officer Ari Ben-Menashe wrote in his 1992 memoir that Barak feared Peres or the Americans would discover the slush fund bank accounts where the arms profits were hidden, and take the money for themselves. Ben-Menashe claimed that Barak arranged for media mogul Robert Maxwell, Ghislaine Maxwell’s father, to launder the Iran weapons profits through his companies’ accounts, and hide the money in Soviet banks where they could not be touched by the Americans.

In 1991, four years after Iran-Contra, Maxwell disappeared from his 180-foot yacht, the Lady Ghislaine, while it cruised off the Canary Islands. Hours later, Spanish authorities recovered his body from the Atlantic. Maxwell’s media empire was collapsing under a mountain of debt, and he was secretly siphoning hundreds of millions of pounds sterling from his companies’ pension funds. When investigators began untangling the books after his death, they found nearly half a billion pounds missing, and possibly more.

An email obtained from Epstein’s Yahoo! inbox, dated October 15, 2005, suggests Ghislaine Maxwell was trying to purchase information about her father’s missing fortune—from a CIA operative. Maxwell emailed Epstein excitedly while visiting Bhutan for the wedding of Princess Chimi Yangzom Wangchuck. She wrote Epstein, “The wedding was amazing…Also was w/a CIA operative who sd that he ‘worked’ w/Dad! I was so shocked. He sd he could tell, all find all, and reveal all, (for a price)!!”

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:50:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364090>

After the Southern Air Transport plane carrying Hasenfus was shot down over Nicaragua on October 5, 1986, the Iran-Contra scheme began to unravel. On October 9, Hasenfus [confessed](https://www.thecrimson.com/article/1986/10/10/captured-american-says-he-is-with/) in a conference before the world’s press that he was working with the CIA to ferry weapons to the Contras, secretly backing their war against Nicaragua’s leftist government. U.S. officials quickly denied Hasenfus’s confession, saying he was on a “private” mission. (Hasenfus passed away in late November of this year)

Southern Air Transport, a CIA front, was not only shipping weapons to the Contras—the planes were also carrying weapons to Israel, to fuel the brutal war between Iran and Iraq. Just weeks after Hasenfus’ press conference, SAT flew its [last Iran-Contra mission](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1987/04/14/iran-contra-overlap-described/c3abd1a3-8b1c-49ce-b7b2-3c684ab60306/), from Tel Aviv to Tehran, carrying 500 U.S.-made anti-tank missiles.

One month later, a Lebanese newspaper broke the story that the Iran arms sales were part of a secret deal in exchange for the release of Americans taken hostage in Lebanon. One of the hostages, CIA officer William F. Buckley, had been killed in captivity. U.S. officials confirmed the reports, spurring an investigation by the Justice Department. Within weeks, the U.S. Attorney General was forced to step in front of news cameras and acknowledge that profits from the Iran arms sales were secretly fueling the Contras. Soon afterwards, newspapers reported that the [same SAT planes](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1987/01/20/ex-cia-airline-tied-to-cocaine/d7e5a04f-462f-479f-bf45-11502e772082/)had been smuggling cocaine from Nicaragua and Colombia into the United States.

The story became a major political scandal in the U.S. In December 1986, reports emerged that Khashoggi had received tens of millions of dollars for brokering the weapons shipments. Within one month, in January 1987, Khashoggi’s U.S. holding company [filed for bankruptcy](https://www.sltrib.com/news/business/2017/06/08/adnan-khashoggi-whose-grand-salt-lake-city-plans-disappeared-in-bankruptcy-dies-at-age-81/); BCCI’s front man, Ghaith Pharaon, [sold off](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1991/09/04/in-georgia-where-money-talks-probers-allege-voice-was-bccis/2f5a1d16-5e11-4c4f-842e-9aa282cc2c48/) his bank assets shortly thereafter. SAT, which was now [flagged in DEA databases](https://irp.fas.org/cia/product/cocaine2/index.html) for suspected cocaine trafficking, pivoted to highly publicized [famine relief](https://www.africaintelligence.com/eastern-africa-and-the-horn/1992/12/19/recycled-cia-firm-transports-food,17781-art) missions in war-torn “[hot spots](https://www.the-independent.com/news/world/airline-swaps-gunrunning-for-good-works-southern-air-transport-was-run-by-the-cia-and-started-the-irancontra-scandal-but-now-its-staff-assure-robert-block-its-main-job-is-saving-somalis-1565324.html)” in Africa with the United Nations and the World Food Programme.

Within months, Epstein appeared to be absorbing lessons from the era’s covert financial engineering. In 1987, as the Iran-Contra operation was unraveling, he emerged as a key financial advisor to retail and fashion kingpin Leslie Wexner. Epstein became an officer of several Wexner shell companies, [while later leading](http://www.dropsitenews.com/p/jeffrey-epstein-leslie-abigail-wexner-pro-israel-philanthropic-foundation) the same family office that ran Wexner’s philanthropic foundation—an architecture that, like BCCI’s, placed a charitable vehicle at the apex of a vast web of companies. That same year, Wexner established The New Albany Company, a massive real estate development project to build a new city in a rural area outside Columbus, Ohio.

Later in 1987, Epstein reprised a basic BCCI tactic: use a regulator-friendly narrative to gain control of a financial institution, then pillage its assets. Just as BCCI used Ghaith Pharaon as a nominee to acquire banks and insurance companies, Epstein helped Steven Hoffenberg persuade Illinois regulators to approve the purchase of two ailing insurers, by promising a $3 million capital injection from Towers Financial, Hoffenberg’s debt collection agency. The money never arrived, of course—after closing the sale, they used the insurers’ bonds as collateral to finance hostile takeovers of two struggling airline companies, Pan Am and Emery Worldwide.

Towers Financial became a [slush fund](https://www.washingtonpost.com/obituaries/2022/08/26/hoffenberg-ponzi-epstein-dies/) that subsidized Epstein’s lavish lifestyle in New York. After it collapsed in 1993, Hoffenberg pleaded guilty to defrauding investors out of nearly half a billion dollars in what the SEC called the largest Ponzi scheme in U.S. history at the time. He was sentenced to twenty years in prison; he later described Epstein as his “[co‑conspirator](https://qz.com/1661999/jeffrey-epsteins-ex-mentor-accuses-him-of-fraud),” though Epstein was never charged.

The stolen money, however, vanished. In 2002, Hoffenberg alleged that Epstein hid $100 million in offshore accounts while [working with prosecutors](http://www.oxygen.com/true-crime-buzz/steven-hoffenberg-says-jeffrey-epstein-helped-him-with-ponzi-scheme) to scapegoat Hoffenberg and other Towers Financial executives. “Epstein certainly did secretly cooperate against Hoffenberg and gave at least three interviews to prosecutors,” [Vicky Ward reported for Rolling Stone,](https://www.rollingstone.com/culture/culture-features/jeffrey-epstein-steven-hoffenberg-intelligence-agencies-spy-1197708/) adding that “had the case gone to trial, a source with knowledge says it would have likely turned out far worse for Epstein than for Hoffenberg.”

In that 2002 interview, Hoffenberg also helped to piece together part of Epstein’s past; he told Ward he believed it was, in fact, Douglas Leese who had introduced Epstein to Adnan Khashoggi. When Ward asked Epstein to respond to Hoffenberg’s claims, Epstein said he didn’t know Leese and furiously rejected any association with the Towers Financial fraud.

Epstein threatened to sue Ward if her story insinuated his culpability in the Ponzi scheme—and, when Vanity Fair attempted to revive the story in 2007, private messages in his Yahoo inbox show that Epstein drafted letters to Ward’s editor, Graydon Carter, railing against her piece and threatening again to sue for defamation. In drafts sent to himself by email, he wrote to Carter, “I am writing to you to give you the opportunity , while ti (sic) still exists to correct a wrong.” (Epstein may have been counseled against sending those emails; Carter told Drop Site he never received them.)

Epstein lied to Ward about his ties to the Leese family: he knew both of Douglas Leese’s two sons very well. The elder brother, Nicholas, wrote a bawdy letter in Epstein’s fiftieth “birthday book” containing anecdotes of escapades – [including description of a sexual assault](https://www.thetimes.com/uk/politics/article/ghislaine-maxwell-birthday-book-jeffrey-epstein-mentor-gjn2r0v9f) framed as hijinx gone wrong – in Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, and Tramp nightclub in London.

The relationship between Epstein and the Leeses remained intimate over the years. According to the emails obtained by Drop Site, Epstein was the godfather of Leese’s granddaughter, and both brothers affectionately addressed Epstein in their emails as “my boy.” In 2007, at Epstein’s request, Julian Leese sent a collection of family photos, writing, “Always thinking of you and the old days.”

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:52:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364091>

Julian Leese briefly worked as an intern at Towers Financial after graduating from University of Salford, and he told journalist Tom Pattinson that his father had [supported](https://seahorse-magnolia-2h7p.squarespace.com/gislaine-podcasts) Towers Financial by introducing Hoffenberg to people in his circle. In his final recorded interview, Julian claimed his father sold radar equipment, not weapons, and admitted that Epstein occasionally advised his father and was present at some of his business meetings. In the same interview, he claimed Epstein and his father had a falling out around the early 80s, over Epstein’s abuse of his father’s expense account—a claim that raises more questions than it answers. (Julian passed away in 2024.) The UK zionist Leese gave birth to Epstein before he transferred him to American Zionist Wexner.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:56:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364092>

Wexner was cut from the same cast as Lansky with one big difference. He has public discoverable assets so he needed a guy like Epstein to hide them.

While the Towers Financial ponzi scheme was taking off, Epstein had risen to the status of chief financial adviser to Wexner’s business empire, built around his clothing company The Limited, headquartered in Ohio. Epstein also became the financial engineer and trusted fixer behind Wexner’s massive real estate development project in New Albany. By 1991, The New York Times [described](https://www.nytimes.com/1991/06/03/style/chronicle-639191.html) Epstein as “president of Wexner Investment Company.” Epstein’s sudden rise to influence [baffled](https://www.nytimes.com/2019/07/25/business/jeffrey-epstein-wexner-victorias-secret.html) Wexner’s old advisers, who were [pushed out](https://www.vanityfair.com/news/2021/06/inside-jeffrey-epsteins-decades-long-relationship-with-his-biggest-client?srsltid=AfmBOopmEbxA8K87zyrgo2f-q9Wwnv5TE9De9ad5qo5MtCzL7MhgXyeg) of Wexner’s organization one by one.

Although Epstein is sometimes described as a con artist who beguiled a naive billionaire—the New York Times called Wexner “[his most significant mark](https://www.nytimes.com/2025/12/16/magazine/jeffrey-epstein-money-scams-investigation.html)”—the series of events leading up to Epstein’s takeover of Wexner’s fortune paint a very different picture.

In 1991, the Columbus Police Department was investigating the mob-style assassination of Arthur Shapiro, an attorney whose firm worked for The Limited. In March 1985, Shapiro was due to testify before a grand jury in a major tax evasion case—but the day before his testimony, he was shot twice in the head, at point-blank range, in his car outside a Columbus cemetery.

Berry Kessler, an accountant, was [considered](https://www.dispatch.com/story/news/2010/03/06/25-year-old-killing-still/987370007/) the prime suspect in Shapiro’s murder; he was later convicted for two unrelated murder-for-hire plots, and sentenced to death. Another Columbus man sharing his last name, John “Jack” Kessler, was Wexner’s partner in The New Albany Company, where Epstein became co-president.

On June 6, 1991, a Columbus police analyst submitted an internal memo that suggested Wexner’s business was [connected](https://www.thedailybeast.com/who-murdered-arthur-shapiro-the-lawyer-of-victorias-secret-billionaire-les-wexner/) to organized crime. The memo identified several Wexner corporate entities formed by the slain lawyer’s office, some of which appeared to be linked to Wexner’s New Albany property development. Epstein’s name later appeared as an officer of some of these same companies when they were dissolved a few years later.

In July 1991, one month after the “Shapiro murder” memo was submitted to the police department’s Intelligence Bureau commander, Wexner signed a document giving Epstein power of attorney to act on his behalf in all affairs, effectively handing Epstein personal control of his vast fortune, and the right to sign property transactions on Wexner’s behalf. The Columbus Police Chief [ordered](https://freepress.org/article/shapiro-murder-file) the memo destroyed. Ohio’s former Inspector General David Sturtz leaked a [surviving copy](https://freepress.org/article/shapiro-murder-file) of the “Shapiro murder” memo to journalist Bob Fitrakis, who published it in July 1998.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T18:59:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364093>

Meanwhile, Miami International Airport made plans to demolish the hangar where Southern Air Transport was suspected of smuggling cocaine, a former U.S. Army depot that had been used by the CIA for more than twenty years ( link to Lansky was Ira Melnick down in South FLA.). With Epstein acting as Wexner’s “[logistics man](https://freepress.org/article/spook-air)” in Ohio, in 1996 SAT finished relocating its world headquarters to Columbus to deliver products [from factories in Hong Kong](http://www.joc.com/article/southern-air-to-launch-hong-kong-columbus-run-5365850) and southern China directly to Wexner’s network of Limited Brands’ stores.

The Ohio Department of Development and Rickenbacker Port Authority assembled a generous incentive package to lure SAT out of Miami, according to FOIA records obtained by Fitrakis.

The Rickenbacker Air National Guard Base was already a well-established military and intelligence hub when Wexner’s company planned to turn it into a consumer logistics port. The nearby [Defense Logistics Agency](https://www.dla.mil/Land-and-Maritime/About/Locations/Columbus/), 15 miles away, was in charge of the global supply chain for weapons systems. A decade earlier, CIA technicians had quietly met Louisiana smuggler [Barry Seal](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barry_Seal) at the same base and installed hidden cameras inside his plane’s fuselage, before sending him back to Nicaragua on a DEA sting.

The state offered a $6 million low-interest loan and a half-million dollar development grant, while the Department of Transportation agreed to pay ten million dollars for infrastructure upgrades. The port authority freed up $30 million in revenue bonds to be used by the project, and the county made the facilities 100-percent tax exempt for fifteen years.

### [Ohio Inspector General quits after only two months on job — The Lantern 29 March 1995 — Ohio State University Newspaper Archives](https://osupublicationarchives.osu.edu/?a=d&d=LTN19950329-01.2.11&dliv=none&e=-------en-20--1--txt-txIN-------)

Ohio State University Newspaper Archives

 osupublicationarchives.osu.edu

In Columbus, the airline did not shed its drug smuggling pedigree. In 1996, customs agents [discovered cocaine](https://www.newspapers.com/image/1166568074/?match=1&terms=cocaine%20cargo) hidden aboard a SAT plane, according to a report in a Mobile, Alabama paper. SAT’s public information officer told the newspaper the plane was delivering “fresh flowers” from a large flower exporter in Colombia. SAT asserted it was “not tied to the CIA and would like to know itself where the cocaine came from.” By the time the Alabama incident hit newswires, the plane in question had been handed over to an insurance company due to “mercury contamination.”

### [The Mobile Register from Mobile, Alabama](https://www.newspapers.com/newspage/1166568074/)

The Columbus experiment ended one year later, as more of SAT’s sordid smuggling history was dragged into public view. In June 1998, after the airline had already collected millions of dollars in state subsidies, SAT decided to “[park and sell off](https://freepress.org/article/spook-air)” its fleet of Lockheed Hercules planes. On October 1, 1998, SAT abruptly filed for bankruptcy—exactly one week before the CIA Inspector General released [its official findings](https://irp.fas.org/cia/product/cocaine2/index.html) on Contra cocaine trafficking allegations.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-20T19:10:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/epstein-was-born-via-iran-contra-affair.32034/post-364096>

Israel's number one export is diamonds but it has no diamond mines, so where did this business begin?

Epstein.

When Ghislaine Maxwell was interviewed by Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, she was asked whether Epstein ever had any contact with intelligence agencies. Maxwell gave a [vague response](https://www.justice.gov/storage/audio-files/Interview%20Transcript/Interview%20Transcript%20-%20Maxwell%202025.07.24%20\(Redacted\).pdf) about Epstein’s business of “finding money” in Africa in the 1980s: “I think he may have suggested that there was some people who helped him,” Maxwell said. “He showed me a photograph that he had with some African warlords or something that he told me…That’s the only actual active memory I have of something nefarious -- not nefarious... but covert, I suppose would be the word.”

In parallel to Iran-Contra, from 1984 to 1986, Southern Air Transport flew hundreds of trips inside Angola, with some runs connecting the capital city Luanda to Dobbins Air Force Base in Marietta, Georgia. Angola’s northeastern diamond-mining towns, cut off by unsafe roads and railways, [were largely accessible only by air](https://www.washingtonpost.com/archive/politics/1986/12/20/with-us-business-airline-took-off/2ef0c4f8-bffe-4311-bb20-9f3f260f4edf/). SAT obtained a lucrative contract from Angola’s state-owned mining company to carry equipment to the mining towns, and carry diamonds out. While making trips to the mines, the SAT planes were [suspected](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1987-07-26-op-1171-story.html) of air-dropping weapons to the rebel group UNITA with South Africa’s support.

South Africa profited handsomely from the Angolan civil war. Johannesburg became a booming re-export hub for illicit Angolan diamonds, as UNITA-controlled “blood diamonds” were under UN embargo and could not be exported legally from Angola. By the late 1990s, UNITA earned billions of dollars by [smuggling diamonds](http://www.jstor.org/stable/24357771) to Johannesburg, where they re-exported with false certificates-of-origin and shipped onward to London and Belgium. A UN report estimated that over $1 million worth of diamonds were [smuggled](http://www.idexonline.com/m/FullArticle?Id=20128) out of Angola per day in 2001. Many of the diamonds were evenutally shipped to Israel for the world market.

Angola was the mirror-image of Iran-Contra. As in Iran, Saudi money was the “bank” for Angola’s war. As in Nicaragua, the diamonds (like the drugs) were fueled by an off-the-books arms trade. An associate of Saudi ruler King Fahd testified before Congress that Saudi aid to UNITA was part of an [informal deal](https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1987-07-26-op-1171-story.html) with Washington in exchange for access to mobile radar surveillance systems. He recounted being told that tens of millions of dollars had been funneled through Morocco to train UNITA fighters, and claimed Prince Bandar had planned to sell oil to South Africa. The Saudi government, of course, has denied these claims.

n Columbus, SAT’s collapse was written off as the result of “[financial troubles](https://www.flightglobal.com/southern-air-ceases-operations/23529.article).” But before declaring bankruptcy in 1998, half of its fleet of Lockheed Hercules planes were [sold to Transafrik](https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/CHRG-105shrg50814/pdf/CHRG-105shrg50814.pdf), an Angolan airline based in the United Arab Emirates. [https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/CHRG-105shrg50814/pdf/CHRG-105shrg50814.pdf](https://www.govinfo.gov/content/pkg/CHRG-105shrg50814/pdf/CHRG-105shrg50814.pdf)

SAT resumed its missions supporting diamond mining operations, as Angola’s civil war raged on. Decades later, Epstein bragged to journalists about making his fortune out of “[arms, drugs, and diamonds](https://www.rollingstone.com/culture/culture-features/jeffrey-epstein-steven-hoffenberg-intelligence-agencies-spy-1197708/).”

### [Was Jeffrey Epstein a Spy?](https://www.rollingstone.com/culture/culture-features/jeffrey-epstein-steven-hoffenberg-intelligence-agencies-spy-1197708/)

The exaggerated stories the notorious financier pedophile told of his time in intelligence circles may have been at least partially true.

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=364083)
>
> **EPSTEIN FILES IN SUMMATION**
>
>
> When a Southern Air Transport plane was shot down over Nicaragua in October 1986, the world got a rare window into U.S. government covert activity. Southern Air Transport was founded as a small cargo airline in 1947, the same year the Office of Strategic Services evolved into the Central Intelligence Agency, as the U.S. pivoted to a Cold War posture. The agency owned the airline outright from 1960 until 1973, at which point it was sold to the same man, Stanley G. Williams, who had run the company since the Kennedy administration.
>
> The downing of the plane, and the testimony of its lone survivor, Eugene Hasenfus, pulled a string that eventually unraveled the scandal known as Iran-Contra. Using Southern Air Transport planes, the CIA was shipping weapons to Iran, using Israel as a middleman, and deploying the profits to arm the Contras against the leftist Nicaraguan government.
>
> None of it was legal, and Southern Air Transport was getting too hot. In need of a new mission, the company relocated its headquarters from Miami, Florida, to Columbus, Ohio. By 1995, the company had rebranded by flying imported shipments of clothing from China. But for three years in Columbus, the airline continued to be dogged by rumors it had been—or was still—involved in smuggling.
>
> According to veteran Columbus journalist Bob Fitrakis, who provided his historical reporting on the topic to Drop Site and The American Conservative, investigators in both the Franklin County Sheriff’s Office and Ohio’s Office of Inspector General were looking into Southern Air Transport amid rising public scrutiny of the Iran-Contra affair—and sources in both offices identified Jeffrey Epstein as having a pivotal role in relocating the planes.
>
> At the time, Epstein was a relatively obscure financier managing the money and real estate investments of Ohio-based fashion and retail mogul Leslie Wexner. Under his stewardship of the Wexner empire, the planes that previously carried arms to Iran and Nicaragua were repurposed to deliver clothes to feed Wexner’s network of retail chains, including Victoria’s Secret and Abercrombie & Fitch.
>
> Southern Air Transport abruptly declared bankruptcy on October 1, 1998—exactly one week before the CIA Inspector General released its official findings on the Iran-Contra affair linking the airline to allegations of Contra cocaine trafficking from Nicaragua. Under pressure from the governor’s office, Ohio officials dropped their inquiries, meaning that Epstein’s role never became public.
>
> How did Epstein end up moving the former Contra planes to Columbus? Answering that question—or at least getting close—requires a closer look at the men behind the scandal that defined the second half of the Reagan administration, and gave the public the clearest look inside the U.S. government’s clandestine global operations in a generation or more. Like a spy service Forrest Gump, Jeffrey Epstein can be found there every leg of the way.
>
>
>
> All the intel forces in the free world all had a social club:
> SAFARI CLUB KENYA,
> SAFARI CLUB IRAN French intel (Jean luc Brunel),
> British intel (Douglas Leese, MI6, Epstein’s mentor),
> Israeli intel (Ehud Barak-Mossad), Saudi intel (adnan KHASHOGGI)
> US intel (Bill Clinton, Jeff Epstein)
>
> And others would meet up have pedo parties, would do these Huge weapons deals, Trafficking deals, Drug deals (for their cartels), And their brokers (all men above) would get 10 percent of the signatory’s net worth. = $$$ LES WEXNER was Epstein’ handler- (he wanted to create an American Bullingdon club.)
>
> EHUD BARAK (formerly Israel), Was funneling weapons To Iran through EPSTEIN,
> JEFF introduced BARAK to the Saudi weapons dealer ADNAN KHASHOGGI,
> Who introduced The Iranian contact to Ehud Barak. HiLLARY CLINTON- was employed by ROSE BANK / FIRM

# Thread: Request for your preferred citations on blue light & disease mechanisms

**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Mark Copeland — 2025-12-27T17:05:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/request-for-your-preferred-citations-on-blue-light-disease-mechanisms.32050/post-364254>

Dr. Jack, I want to make sure I’m representing your position accurately.

Across your videos and podcasts, you’ve described chronic blue-light exposure (especially without adequate sunlight) as a major upstream driver of cognitive decline, dopamine dysfunction, and multiple chronic diseases. I’m trying to trace the _specific_ evidence base you rely on so I don’t default to the more generic “blue light affects sleep” framing, which I know isn’t what you mean.

Could you share the primary papers _you consider most authoritative_ for:

-   blue-wavelength light exposure and dopamine signaling (how it’s measured),
-   cognitive or neurological outcomes attributable specifically to blue light,
-   and links from these mechanisms to disease risk (beyond circadian disruption alone)?

If there’s a particular set of studies or authors you think people consistently misunderstand or overlook, I’d really like to read those directly.

Appreciate your time, I’m asking in good faith and with genuine interest in the data.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-29T17:02:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-risk-of-ai-is-steep.32055/post-364331>

AI is forcing power to migrate. Power is shifting from institutions to systems. From labor to algorithms. From human judgment to automated decision-making. How energy flows will determine fates.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-29T17:02:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-risk-of-ai-is-steep.32055/post-364332>

The future described here is not science fiction. It is the quiet arrival of a new phase of civilization. Artificial intelligence is no longer just a tool that assists humans it is becoming a system that observes, learns, decides, and acts. When memory expands to millions of tokens, when machines can plan, reason, and execute across domains, the question is no longer what can technology do? but who controls it, and for what purpose? This transformation is not only technological; it is political, economic, and deeply human.

### Jack Kruse — 2025-12-29T17:04:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-risk-of-ai-is-steep.32055/post-364333>

The danger is not intelligence itself, but speed without ethics or Natural boundaries. When progress outpaces responsibility, societies fracture. When energy, computation, and data concentrate in the hands of a few, inequality becomes structural rather than accidental.

We are entering an era where the defining question is no longer “Can we build it?” but “Should we?” and more importantly, “Who decides?” This moment demands something older than technology: wisdom, restraint, and collective accountability. The future will not be shaped by machines alone. It will be shaped by the values of those who command them.

AI needs to be curbed on money and energy to limit its damage. Bitcoiners will be those people who realize this attack vector soon.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-member-like-any-info-re-partner-on-hrt-pre-diabetic-scleroderna.32058/post-364368>

Hi , looking forward to being involved in the forum and sharing good info. My partner (53) is slim , average weight but suffering from years of trauma and ptsd - now coming to a better place. Main issues of concern are HRT patches for 2 years now, hot flushes , scleroderma - sometimes difficultly in swallowing and often stiff joints with little power in her hands and weakness in limbs, underactive thyroid. This changes for the better in hot climates and of course - sunlight. Any suggestions appreciated.
Thanks
Richard

I think many have struggled understanding the power in that slide above. It has 20 years of blog lesson buried in it.

The bottom line is this, evolution plan is well thought out even when your partner's one blows.
PGC-1α is the molecular embodiment of the 30 million volt field’s decision-making.
When the field is strong and NAD⁺ is high (380 nm + darkness), PGC-1α is maximally deacetylated and phosphorylated → explosive mitochondrial biogenesis and geometric restoration of the ATPase bowl that leads to all disease renovation.

When the field collapses and NAD⁺ is low (blue light + high NO), PGC-1α is acetylated and degraded → biogenesis halts and heteroplasmy wins. 380 nm + neuropsin → NAD⁺ → SIRT1 → deacetylated PGC-1α → restored 30 MV/cm field → new, healthy mitochondria with perfect V-angles and IMJs.

That is the entire photorepair–biogenesis loop in one sentence.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-member-and-suggestions-for-my-partners-current-issues-appreciated.32059/post-364377>

Stop Taking Sleep Supplements Until You Fix Your Morning Light.Stop Blaming “Aging” Until You Audit Your Circadian Clock.

Stop Chasing Recovery Hacks When Your Biological Day Never Properly Starts.

High-performers who train hard, work hard, and still feel flat, sore, or under-recovered—you’re not broken.You’re just treating the wrong level. You do not know about the U curve of exercise.

Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

You’ve been fighting biochemistry when the real issue is biophysics.

your 2026 Reframe:
Your body is a solar-powered clock.
Miss the morning light signal → the night repair crew never fully clocks in.

Key truths most miss:

-   Recovery tools fail not because they’re bad, but because they’re mistimed.
-   95%+ of melatonin is made in your mitochondria, not the pineal gland—and it’s triggered by bright morning light + near-infrared.
-   Morning sunlight → mitochondrial melatonin → nighttime repair, hormones, recovery.

Skip the sunrise cue?
You start the day in debt.
No supplement or hack can catch you up.
Timing is non-negotiable.

_**The hierarchy your body actually follows:**_

1.  _**_**Physics (light, dark, timing)**_**_
2.  _**_**Energy (mitochondria)**_**_
3.  _**_**Genes**_**_
4.  _**_**Chemistry**_**_
5.  _**_**Symptoms**_**_

**_You can’t fix #4 without nailing #1._**

_Healthy longevity is less about adding energy, and more about cancelling the noise inside the system_.

The usual pattern we see daily: Indoor mornings. Sunglasses. Screens. Blue LEDs. → Poor sleep, slow recovery, stubborn inflammation.

Fix the light timing → everything downstream improves. No new gadgets needed.The simple formula that works:

1.  Early outdoor sunlight (no sunglasses)
2.  Bright days, true dark nights
3.  Train in your circadian energy windows
4.  Evening light hygiene

Health isn’t passive. It’s earned through environment.
If you want a pill or shortcut, keep scrolling.
If you’re ready to own your timing and upgrade your performance—this is for you.
You don’t have a recovery problem.
You have a timing problem.
Fix the timing.
Everything changes

### Woodstock — 2026-01-02T20:27:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-member-and-suggestions-for-my-partners-current-issues-appreciated.32059/post-364468>

Living as she does in the East of England , little sun , normal 'white outs' - a particularly unhealthy cocktail. I have heard that certain chicken lights may contain all good necessary 'sun' type frequencies - do you know of any and whether this is indeed beneficial or can you recommend a particular product ?. You mention in many of your interviews the freq 380 , 1280 and 1535nm - is there somewhere on your site I can find more info regarding these ?

I have similar improvements to similar symptoms as your partner. The SUN and for me also saltwater is incredibly healing. Colorado isn’t as northern latitude as the UK but there are a ton of nnEMFs here and the symptoms eventually return. But I improve even in a high nnEMF place in the tropics as long as I am spending hours in the ocean while there because the ocean is a faraday cage. But it’s still critical to have meters to check EMFs and try to find an area with low nnEMF.

I spent 6 out of the last 13 months in the tropics near a beach and getting in the ocean daily. 5 months back in Colorado and though overall I feel better than a year ago, I still have many autoimmune symptoms and some disturbing lab results.

Uncle Jack will probably say something like “if you love her get her to move to the tropics and be out grounding in the sun every day for as many hours as she can stand it.”

It can be complicated unless someone has the ability to be a digital nomad and nothing to hold them back.

The biggest challenge for me is that I’m very rooted where I’m at. I was creating my citadel in my home of 30 years. Now I have to start all over from scratch somewhere that is probably outside of the US and I don’t speak the language and I’m NoT a digital nomad and actually am too disabled to work any job I can imagine without making my condition worsen. Also I have anxiety when I’m away from my family, home, dogs, and community so I have to find a balance with my mental health.

This is not an easy path. But I wake up stiff and my pain reminds me that I need to find a way.

Sounds like you should get her to the tropics. But my personal experience says to find a tropical place that will bring you joy and where you can both do the things you love.

In the meantime, many of us (mitos) use EMR-Tek lights. They have little to no flicker. You can get just red lights. But they also have ones that provide UVB which will help with Vitamin D. This could help until you can get to the tropics full time. The sun is better. EMR-Tek has a very affordable mini red light for around $150. It would make a lot more sense than a chicken lamp. USB chargeable and puts out a lot of light without heat and risk of burning down your house. And no flicker.

# Thread: Seeking guidance on learning Decentralized Medicine

### funsun — 2025-12-30T21:01:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-guidance-on-learning-decentralized-medicine.32062/post-364385>

Every once in a while one encounters a surprise in life that suddenly makes a whole lot of things clear, makes sense. Of course hearing Jack Kruse speak for the first time was such a surprise and I’m very grateful for that but recently also I watched a video presentation by Doug Wallace shared by Dr. Kruse here on the forum and that also brought a warm feeling of truth being brought to light.

I want to learn decentralized medicine. I have listened to a few dozen of Jack’s podcasts, but I noticed solely podcast are not enough to gain a deep understanding. I have around a high schoolers knowledge in biology and other sciences and I have planned to read the top five books that Jack recommends which are Andrew Marino going somewhere, Robert O Becker, the body electric, Roland van wick light sculpts life, Jerald pollock the fourth phase of water, Nick lane power sex and suicide.

My question to those who have a deep understanding of decentralized biology is, is it ok to start here and go about reading these books, looking up, or perhaps asking an AI to explain words and concepts I don’t understand or would it be wiser to read some traditional introductory biology or maybe physics book and if so, which one? which centralized book is fine to read?

Also, when should I start reading Dr. Kruse‘s blogs and which ones should I start with?

I am interested in all aspects of human health and biology.

Thanks to all.

### MTA321 — 2025-12-30T22:50:32+0200

Like you, I have very little background in the hard sciences but that probably helps when compared to coming from a background where centralized science is shoved down your throat. Of course, you also begin to realize all other aspects of life is centralized as well and that is a whole other rabbit hole. I don't see problem with needing a bridge (AI, etc.) when understanding and assimilating the concepts. For me it is still a high learning curve trying to understand various concepts of physics, biology, biochemistry, etc. but things eventually start clicking the more I read. Jack does a good job reintegrating many concepts across the blog series to help with that.

You can start with the free ones -
[https://jackkruse.com/](https://jackkruse.com/) > Click on blog index

All blogs from July 2017 onward available via patreon

[https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse)

### funsun — 2025-12-31T22:56:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-guidance-on-learning-decentralized-medicine.32062/post-364416>

Thanks for the input and suggestions [@MTA321](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/35364/), it's nice to know one's not alone in this.

I also found the quilt document which is at [https://jackkruse.com/quilt/](https://jackkruse.com/quilt/) (the link on Jack's website is broken) which I thought is also a good intro to the different facets of Doc's work. As I understand, the different blog series are going in depth into on of the "levees" outlined in the quilt.

Seeing Doug Wallace's presentation about Mitochondria (

), made a lot of things clear probably because it was a different perspective talking on the same things Doc talks about, so I am hopeful the suggested books will make the role of mitochondria, light, etc even more clear.

What a relief to be able to learn the mechanisms that really underlie the common diseases.

### ToothDriller — 2026-01-01T01:19:59+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-guidance-on-learning-decentralized-medicine.32062/post-364423>

You may want to check out Alexis Jazmyn Quantum U series. She is an excellent educator.

Adults learn differently than children. Children are sponges and can learn in all ways. Once you become an adult not so much. You've been dumbed down by blue light and nnEMF.
Figure out the best way you like to learn. The 3 options are
1\. Hands on (workshops)
2\. Live Lecture style or Podcasts/Videos
3\. Reading texts,blogs,books etc
Whichever of the 3 is dominant make that happen. Then use the other 2 methods to fill in the gaps. So for example

As a dentist I am totally a hands on learner. If someone showed me something once and then watched me do it I was good. So I always gravitated to hands on or live workshop type learning. However then upon coming home I would search podcasts or on demand videos to reinforce what I just learned. Finally not a huge fan of reading which I admit makes Jacks blogs very hard for me to get through (but yet I do).
This is called layered learning and that is what adults need to do. Hear information in multiple ways to make it stick. Then each time you hear something your recall becomes faster and your knowledge grows.
Thats my .2cents
Andy (ToothDriller)
on a misson to #stopthesnore

It's great to know I'm not alone in this.

# Thread: Up In The Air

### JenniferM — 2025-12-31T18:07:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/up-in-the-air.32065/post-364407>

I posted how one more PET scan if cler will follow by 2 more ct's spaced out 6-8 months apart. Anxiety kicking in here to closer it gets to PET scan. When I had primary surgery, the guy next to me in recovery died. They wheeled me up against the wall to have plenty of room to work on him to no avail. I was left in the hallway for 8 hours then put in another room with a man who also started the death rattle but they worked on him and wheeled him off. It was carzy.
The hospital was overbooked, not even standing room. I had a major complex surgery and was left in recovery for about 20 hours due to the GI floor not having any beds. The staff would come by, stick their hand in between the curtain and wall where the needle box was (near my feet). One needle did land on my bed. I started screaming about lawsuits.
My question is since two men didn't fare so well with surgery at the end of January and thinking that could as well have been me, is there a best time of day, season, weather, ect for helping with a successful surgery? Does nature and surgery collide at certain times? I don't know if this makes ny sense but thought I'd ask anyway.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-01-01T18:14:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/up-in-the-air.32065/post-364443>

The best time is May 1st until July 4th in the Northern hemisphere.

### JenniferM — 2026-01-02T03:57:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/up-in-the-air.32065/post-364452>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=364443)

### BenWCam — 2025-12-31T22:21:43+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cushing%E2%80%99s-disease.32068/post-364414>

This is from a friend of mine who is waiting to join the forum:

"I have an endoscopic endonasal pituitary tumor resection scheduled for January 6 of 2026. It is an ACTH excreting pituitary tumor, causing Cushing’s disease. I believe I’ve had it for a while now, but has escalated in the last two years making the symptoms undeniable hence my exploration into further testing and diagnosis.

I am looking for any edge I can get in battling this disease and prepping and recovering from neurosurgery. Also, knowing that reoccurrence often happens with this type of tumor, I am looking for advice and wisdom in mitigating that potential.

It seems like a longshot knowing how rare this disease is, but any, and all experience or advice would be much appreciated.

Thank you"

### Jack Kruse — 2026-01-01T18:12:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cushing%E2%80%99s-disease.32068/post-364442>

The disease is not rare in NS circles. All pituitary tumors tell the decentrlaized NS you have a seriously bad realationship with light in your centrali retinal pathways.

Fix that is paramount post op. If you don't do not expect to do well.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-heart-as-a-source-of-magnetic-flux-to-effect-others.32072/post-364441>

**THE HEART AS A SOURCE OF MAGNETIC FLUX TO EFFECT OTHERS**

The first lesson of 2026 for new SAVAGES:

The human heart produces a magnetic field that extends ~3 to 22 feet outside the body in 360 degree radius. The environment it is in determines the strength of field. It's the strongest EMF in the body (~50–100 times stronger than the brain’s), and it fluctuates depending our cognitive and emotional state. This makes the vagus nerve the large magnetic loop in known biology. It is the Z axis in our Human GPS. It connects the brain to the heart via the cardiac plexus.

### 0.66eV Eva — 2026-01-02T04:12:43+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-364456>

I won't even start with my health history. I'm starting with NOW.
I met a pirate on December 20.
Bought a one-way ticket to El Salvador for January 6.
We're gonna sail in Costa del Sol, Guatemala, Honduras...
On a MacGregor 26.
With what's left of me and my money after a 30 year period of medical destructive treatments and a 5 year of slow insufficient healing.
It's time to leave a house that is on (EMF) fire so that my brain stops burning
And time to leave the 46° for a while
And bring my Safe and Sound pro II with me
That's a beginning

This 2026 I become a radically different person, as I want to shed so many aspects of what I am.
And I leave this sculpting work to the sun
What I keep of the old me is my avidity to learn, my deep empathy, and my burning rage
This rage which stopped turning against my own self in 2020, when I discovered that "how I was"...was not my fault, but that if I stayed broken therafter, it would be my sole entire fault.
Radical responsibility.
Radical self-love.

I'll learn spanish, how to sail, how to make money, perform melanin renovation, open my heart, buy btc, love the people I'll let into my life, become one of Kruse's savages...
I long for so much in such excruciatingly painful times. 5G, mind control, great reset, cbdc, sv40.........
It'll be messy, maybe chaotic. Maybe my new plan won't work out for even a week.
Maybe it will.

But at this point for me...

Nothing to lose
It might be fun
No talk of spending life-times in the sun...
Although we may

Although I may...

Cheap cheap choices

Since our arrival we ate shrimps sold at the tiendas a few times, and 3 days ago we ate fish that had not stayed well refrigerated (we don't have a refrigerator on the boat.

And we literally live on the boat.
Cheap cheap choices.

I was rehydrated at the clinic of Tasajera and was given an H1 antihistamine intravenously, the latter which did me no good.

We returned to the clinic the same day because I was getting even worse.

I was given tablets of antihistamines and n butyl bromide none of which I took.

Today I have lab results
Iodamoeba butschlii
Blastocystis hominis

I got prescribed Paromomycin and probiotics

"(Gabrosidina) inhibits bacterial and protozoal protein synthesis by binding to the **16S ribosomal RNA** in the 30S ribosomal subunit, leading to misreading of mRNA and production of defective proteins, ultimately causing microbial death."

Not sure about that one, so I'll try to find ivermectin tomorrow....

Not sure I'll attach a song to that one post..........

### 0.66eV Eva — 2026-02-28T22:25:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-367824>

**Trading between two chaos**

I am still on the sailboat despite the chaos.
A chaos that stems from our poor health and wealth, that of the pirate and myself.

It's a battle to repair the pickup truck, the sailboat, and our health. Because we both have serious health challenges.
I could tell he had serious problems before we left for the ES. But he's improving with my mitochondriac suggestions.
I chose to trade the chaos of Quebec City's high electromagnetic fields and low sunlight for the chaos of life on a 26-meter sailboat with someone I had just met.
The walk along the St. Lawrence River, two hours a day, with my coat open to the Quebec winter wind... always took place in an environment of 36,000 µW/m2...

It's a battle because I reject his view of life, health, money, and relationships. We argue constantly. I try to explain photorepair, melanopsin renovation, the danger of nnEMFs, the fact that I need all the sun there is here if I want to get better... I think he'll understand. He is extremely benevolent and has genuine good faith.

Despite the moments of chaos, my new environment makes me want to stay. Even though I find it hard.

The choice is still crystal clear to me.
If I can regulate my hormones... all the other pieces of the puzzle of my life will fall into place. If only I could regain my energy and concentration, get rid of those constant migraines, and of symptoms that look like intracranial hypertension. I'll be able to work as a freelance voice-over actress, copywriter, or tutor... there are many things I'd love to do.

I may have to come up with a plan B if I can stay in El Salvador. Maybe a Workaway place in El Salvador.
The challenge is my level of dysautonomia. Dizziness, weakness, hyperhidrosis, brain fog, dehydration, facial swelling, cystitis... exacerbation of all symptoms at the end of the luteal phase. I'm in slow motion, I have trouble thinking or planning anything.

I'm in Bahia del Sol today to access Wi-Fi from my computer and write this. And nnEMFs make me dizzy. I have made other attempts in previous weeks to write here in my optimal journal, but I am overwhelmed by all the information I want to share. On the 18th day of my cycle today, I got a tiny bit more energy to manage to write this post.

In Bahia, near the pool, I get a maximum of 1230 µW/m2 and an average of ~5-6. I still need to learn more about the Safe & Sound Pro II. Another day, I'll take measurements at the tables near the pier, where I sit with my computer.

The heat in the boat also makes me dizzy and nauseous.

There is no other solution:
I have to spend more time on the beach in the sun
swim in the ocean,
drink at least 4 liters of water (maybe 7?), ideally ice cold,
ground for longer,
eat more fresh fish and seafood,
do CT,
stop eating fruit and honey to reduce my deuterium intake...
...

**The sailboat I love and hate**

Light
The boat is always open
I see the sunrise and sunset from the boat almost every day (I'm going to set my alarm to make sure I don't miss a single one from now on).

Light at night
The spotlights around the mangrove, from the boat, are quite powerful. I decided to wear my red Ra glasses for dusk.
I have a view of the starry sky and enjoy the breeze coming in through the window above my head. I sometimes wear my sleep mask, especially when the moonlight is too bright.

nnEMFs
We drop anchor near Cordoncillo, after the most powerful spotlights, behind the trees. I lose signal on my phone, but not him. With my Safe & Sound Pro II, near Cordoncillo, I get a maximum of ~3.03 and an average between ~0.4 and 0.5. Another day, the average was 0.2 and the maximum was 306. I don't know exactly why the maximum varies so much.
Sometimes we anchor for the night in the mangrove, not far from the Pacomar restaurant at the Estero, whre the average is 0,089-0,126, and the max ~1350.

EF and MF
We don't have AC power on the boat, only DC from two parallel 12-volt batteries and two solar panels without inverters. We used to turn off the power at night, but since a problem arose with one of the batteries, we stopped turning it off. I need to learn more to understand if our setup poses any risks.

Grounding
We are not grounded when we are in the boat. I'll see what I can do... especially for the night.

My next posts will be about all my currents symptoms and my whole medical history. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

i'm going to be sailing in Fiji so I'm interested in what biohacks you figure out. how do you navigate? Do you not have Starlink or something? is there a way to biohack starlink on a sailboat?

### 0.66eV Eva — 2026-03-02T01:44:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-367892>

> [Woodstock said:](/goto/post?id=367835)
>
> i'm going to be sailing in Fiji so I'm interested in what biohacks you figure out. how do you navigate? Do you not have Starlink or something? is there a way to biohack starlink on a sailboat?

We don't have Starlink. For the moment we stayed in the mangrove and we pay for mobile data. I put my phone on airplane mode most of the day and all night and I brought Faraday bags for both cellphones. Frankly, I'm still struggling to make the captain understand how dangerous nnEMFs are, and he has a Samsung Galaxy s21 ultra, which is bad. I got quite mad today again about it. I have used my computer only 5 times in the last 2 months and I use my cellphone for 1 or 2 hours a day, sometimes less.

We're gonna sail to Costa Rica but the sailing trip is for 4 days only. So we didn't look into Starlink. At Bahia del sol, there was at least a woman that uses Starlink on her sailboat to do remote work for a company from the USA. I mentioned the dangers of nnEMFs to her and others...

Tell me more about you sailing in Fiji!

### Anthony Smith — 2026-03-02T02:08:31+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-367895>

> [Woodstock said:](/goto/post?id=367835)
>
> i'm going to be sailing in Fiji so I'm interested in what biohacks you figure out. how do you navigate? Do you not have Starlink or something? is there a way to biohack starlink on a sailboat?

My Dad had a sail boat (catamaran), I sailed the English Channel with him and the Greek Islands. He crossed the Atlantic in it.
If you ask these questions you should not be sailing . . . Unless . . . You have an experienced Captain.
Get them to turn off the radar as much as they are willing to do.
Is there a way to biohack Starlink . . . Use the OFF button.

Inverting DC to AC or AC to DC is a primary source of “DE”. The panels are not functioning at night BUT if you are running AC appliances off (DC) batteries at night then there is an inverter Involved. IF you have an all DC system then the issue is minimal.

### Espresso — 2026-03-04T13:08:25+0200

### 0.66eV Eva — 2026-03-05T01:05:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-368123>

It's all DC. With no AC appliances.

**The (oppositional) pirate**

I thought this trip was a dream option. I still think it could have been. Could...

But I'm looking for a plan B more and more. I'll look for Workaway options.

I think I already know the answer to my question, but I need to share in this forum because it can be understood only through the lenses of mitochondriac wisdom.

When to let go and move on when you've offered a wonderful opportunity from someone, but that the person offering it has ODD and struggles robs you of your peace of mind?

Before meeting him I didn't know that oppositional defiant disorder (ODD) really existed. I thought it was control freak psychiatrist bullshit. But he's searching for confrontation multiple times a day, asking me repetitively to agree with him on various subjects, getting angry and very insistent even when I agree with him, or asking repetitively to choose a vitamin B supplement for him even when I explain why the options available here are far from optimal and that an epi-paleo diet is a better approach. Everyday, 50 times a day, he tries to make me understand how much he hates ES and how naive I am to want to immigrate here.

I don't think that he really hates ES, I think he hates the extreme state of fight or flight he's lived in his entire life, and all the complications and suffering it has brought him. This ODD/ADHD is hell following him wherever he goes.

I started reading about ADHD on the forum and learned that it is part of the demyelination diseases. And I think ODD is linked to ADHD.

I told him he needed to spend a lot of time at the beach too. He says he has too many problems to resolve.

The positive: He is genuinely a benevolent person with good faith. He stopped most carbs when I told him about deuterium. He stopped marijuana and cigarette right before our trip when I suggested him to. He's hard working and curious. But this ODD makes him like Jekyll and Hyde.

I can't get mad at him for his behavior...and I thought we would make a mitochondriac healing trip. I was inspired and full of hope. The trip of my life. To discover who I can be after a lifetime of living like a ghost.

But if he refuses the Mito lifestyle... even when he recommends it to his friends and family. It seems that it is time for me to leave the boat and wish us both good luck.......

He's got :

Raynaud (he feels cold and has cold feet even in ES and he heats his water to wash himself at night),

painful constipation and hemorrhoids, IBS

ADHD (demyelination) and probably ODD

severe back pain and neck pain

Muscle pain and cramps

myopia and presbytia

a yellow cracked coated tongue with methane (?) breath

He refused to have his thyroid removed when they found a calcified possible carcinoma

trouble peeing for almost a decade until he stopped carbs this year and took fluconazole for 10 days

Still wakes up 3 or 4 times during the night to pee (vasopressin issue)

refused the COVID vaccines

Inflammation of the rotator cuff in the right shoulder

Bad teeth

Has stopped alcohol completely at 35 after more than a decade of being an alcoholic.

### Anthony Smith — 2026-03-05T03:38:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-368141>

To live a peaceful life I have found it helps when the people I spend most of my time with live peaceful lives.
I have no problem with disagreement, it can actually be mentally stimulating when engaged in respectfully/peacefully.

### Woodstock — 2026-03-05T03:47:31+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jumping-with-a-sailboat-wings.32073/post-368142>

How long had he been using MJ? Quitting abruptly after long term use could make some of these conditions worse if it was helping in some way. It can take a long time to wean off to keep it all in balance. Probably tobacco too. Nicotine patches help my brain and ADD type of symptoms. If he quit things quickly he might need some transitional support.

I want to see the Greek Islands and the Whitsundays here.

Thanks guys
